With strong faith in yourself, and strong faith in your Master, whoever he may be, that Spontaneous Conviction will happen. Have one Master only! Don’t change your Master. The Masters are like mothers. You don’t change your mother! Be loyal to yourself, and be loyal to your Master. Then, there will be enlightenment.

p.strong: 2 THE PRINCIPLE OF SPIRITUALITY

p.emphasis: “You have accepted that which is not. Illusion means you have accepted that which is not. This body-form is not your identity. But you accepted “I am somebody”. The body is not going to remain constant. It undergoes change – from a child, to a young man, and then, to an old man. This is not your identity. Forget about it!”

p.strong: 15. Why do I need spirituality?

section.p: You need spirituality so that you can know what Reality is. You need spirituality to realize that you are Ultimate Truth. Why is reading required? Why is spirituality required? Why is a Master required? Why is knowledge required? And for whom?

What is the use of spiritual knowledge? Prior to beingness or consciousness, spiritual knowledge did not exist. You did not know yourself. After leaving the body, you will not know yourself. The body is not your identity. The body was not your identity. And the body is not going to remain your identity. It is a fact. But we are not accepting this fact. When the Spirit clicked with the body, you accepted illusion, “I am somebody”, either a man, or a woman. This is not your identity. Who is holding the body? Who is talking from this body? Who is listening from this body? It is: “That Invisible Anonymous Unidentified That You Are.” Unless this Ultimate Truth is established permanenty within you, it will not be possible for you to know Reality. “Ultimate Reality Will Not Emerge Until All Your Body-Based Knowledge Has Dissolved.”

Prior to beingness, you did not know yourself. When the Spirit clicked with the body, knowingness began. You became aware of your existence: “I am”, and instantly, the world came into view, including your father, mother, relatives and friends.

Everyone is trying to condition, you with their own thoughts, their social culture, spiritual culture, etc. And as it is the nature of Spirit to easily absorb influences, it accepts all these illusory concepts: “You are a man, or a woman, a father or mother. These people are your relations. You are a Christian or a Hindu”, etc, and many other concepts, hundreds and thousands of concepts. We have created our lifestyle from illusory concepts. And, we have been living our life, trapped within the circle, of these illusory concepts.

We are downright ignorant. We do not know who we are. In this life, we have so many attachments to the body, the body-related relations, father, mother, sister, brother, husband, wife, son, daughter, Master, God. We have grown attached to everything. And, in the process, we have completely forgotten about Truth.

Where were all these attachments prior to beingness? There were none, of course. All our relations came along with this body. All our relations will dissolve, disappear, along with this body. We are sometimes, maybe too attached to our families. It is okay, as long as you know that the family is also an illusion, and that all you are doing, is playing a role.

At the last stage, you should be free from all desires. Just now, we have a lot of desires, a lot of needs, a lot of requirements because this illusory life, this body-based-knowledge often becomes unbearable. All beings including animals, have desires, but we are fortunate to be in a human form that is endowed with intellect. This gives us the ability to understand.

The mind means the flow of thoughts. There is a continuous flow of thoughts – good thoughts and bad thoughts. There are three types of thought flowing inside: “spiritual”, “commercial”, and “criminal”. Put simply, spiritual thought means that we are always thinking about the deities, the gods and the goddesses, saying prayers, searching for spiritual knowledge, Self-knowledge, etc. Commercial thought means consumerism, seeking enjoyment and so on. And criminal thought refers to hatred, struggle, conflicts, etc.

Spiritual thoughts will help you to establish your true identity, and deepen your Conviction. You will begin to master the thoughts, deciding which ones to accept, and which ones to reject. It is up to you. Everybody has so many questions, hundreds of questions that they wish to ask. These questions appear upon your Presence because you have forgotten your Identity. Basically, you are Ultimate Truth. You are God! Still, in spite of this literal, spiritual knowledge, you find yourself asking more and more questions.

p.strong: 16. What is the principle behind spirituality?

section.p: The principle of spirituality is: “Except Your Selfless Self There is No God, No Brahman, No Atman, No Master.” This means that all the Power, all the Energy is in you, and you alone. There is nothing except Selfless Self. “You Are the Central Point of the Universe.” This is the conclusion.

Who is holding the body? It is that Invisible Presence, or Unidentified Identity, called Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master. “The Master is Not Separate From You. God is Not Separate From You.” But, you are measuring yourself as a form, either as a male, or female form, when basically, “You Are Formless”. This misconception is the problem. Prior to beingness, there was no form. You are holding a human body that belongs to the five elements. The Holder, the Sustainer, of the body is called Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master. “That” has nothing to do with this world.

Prior to meeting a Master, we considered ourselves to be body-forms, either as men or women. We were trying to extract happiness and peace, a fearless and tension-free life, from various different sources. However, with temporary and material sources, our happiness was always short-lived. We could only find fleeting happiness. There was little pleasure in life. And we were always encountering difficult and painful atmospheres. We were facing umpteen, different problems: family problems, financial problems, mental problems, physical problems. Then everything changed! Everything changes when you meet a Master, when you listen to spiritual knowledge, and practice meditation.

The principle behind spirituality is the removal of all the concepts, including, the “I am” concept. “I am Brahman” is also a concept. When all these concepts have dissolved, “There You Are Without Any Identity.” Listen to me! When all the concepts including Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, Master, disciple, etc, dissolve, There You Are. That Spontaneous Conviction is supposed to appear. After the Spontaneous Conviction, you will no longer feel attracted to going anywhere else to find Ultimate Truth, because you will know, that Ultimate Truth is not separate from you. You are Ultimate Truth.

p.strong: 17. Is spirituality useful?

section.p: That’s an important question! We are always quoting from others, talking about what Ramana Maharshi says, what Nisargadatta Maharaj says, what Vedanta says, and what all the other Masters say. Our human life is an unbalanced life. Prior to beingness, there was no awareness. When we leave the body, there will be no awareness. This is fact. And, in between, we are travelling through this miserable, human life.

Spirituality can make your life a pleasant, blissful experience. It can transform your life into an ecstatic one, that is filled with happiness and peace. Your life can be blissful, peaceful, and fearless, without any suffering.

Try to identify yourself. “Spirituality Invites the Attention of the Invisible Listener.” It teaches that whatever you have listened to, and whatever you have learned, is meaningless. It is second-hand knowledge. It is illusion. All these layers appeared upon your Presence. “Your Spontaneous Invisible Presence, or Unidentified Identity is Ultimate Truth”, (these are only words), where there is no experience, no experiencer, and no witness. In brief, it is the way you were prior to beingness.

How were you prior to beingness? You reply with a simple answer, “I don’t know”. After leaving the body, how will you be? “I don’t know”, you reply. However, behind that “I don’t know”, there is something that is Invisible and Formless, within you. But all the time, we are measuring ourselves in the body-form. Even with spiritual knowledge, we still view it from a body-based perspective. Spirituality is only useful, if it can help you to identify yourself. It is only useful, if it can help you to know yourself in a real sense.

Because of our long association with the body, we have strong faith, and a strong belief in this food-body. The food-body has a time-limit, but, the Holder of the food-body, has no limits whatsoever. We can understand this fact intellectually: “I Am Not the Body”. It is an Open Fact. The body has a lifespan of 60, 70, 80 years, or whatever it may be, and then, willingly or unwillingly, you must vacate the body.

We need to identify ourselves in a real sense. Presently, we are identifying ourselves in the body-form. That is illusion. Spirituality helps us to discriminate between illusion and Reality. “That Which You See is Illusion, but That Through Which You See is Reality.”

We frequently hold high expectations, thinking that: “If I go and see this Master, something will happen, like a miracle”. Nothing is going to happen, unless you visit your own Inner Master. You are to think about yourself very seriously because this is your time. You have a golden opportunity to identify yourself. What is the body? Just glimpses of “I”, glimpses of “I”. There is no birth or death, no destiny or past birth. There is nothing. Absorb this knowledge!

p.strong: 18. What is the secret of spirituality?

section.p: The secret is to remove the layers that are covering your Presence, so that you can know yourself in a real sense. The basic error is that you are counting yourself as the body-form, and that is to be discarded. It is a fact, that the body is not your identity at all. Dry spiritual discussion will not help you. You are Ultimate Truth. Spirituality shows you how to absorb this Truth, your Ultimate Truth.
All your body-based concepts must dissolve. And then, the Originality, your Originality, the Spontaneous Presence,

where there is no experience and no experiencer, will emerge. We need to use some words to try and convince the Invisible Listener. However, words are not sufficient to define, or expose the true meaning of spirituality. But, nonetheless, we are trying our level-best to convince you, so that you can leave behind all this illusion, and know the Reality.

What is Reality? Your Spontaneous Invisible Presence is Reality. It has no birth, and no death. Basically, you are unborn. You see, the moment that the Spirit clicked with the body, you started saying “I am”. And that “I am” was instantly coloured by many, many concepts when the world appeared, such as “I am a man”, or “I am a woman”, “I am somebody” – endless concepts.

The world is projected out of your Spontaneous Invisible Presence. It is like when you are dreaming, and the dream-world is projected. In this dream-world, you experience many different kinds of emotions, concepts and people. You can see the sea, the sun, the moon, the hills, and endless vistas. This world is projected out of your Spontaneous Invisible Presence, just like the dream-world is projected from you. This life is a long dream. Wake up from the dream!
When the illusory layers have all been removed, eureka! “There You Are: The Source of Happiness, the Source of Everything.”

p.strong: 19. What do we mean by spirituality?

section.p: Spirituality means identifying oneself in a real sense. Your consciousness is pure consciousness. But this consciousness is within the body-form, and therefore, it has created some confusion. This has resulted, in our imagining ourselves to be something else, something other, something different and separate, from pure consciousness.

You are that Invisible Unidentified Identity called Brahman, Atman, God, Master. This is the foundation of our teachings. Therefore, my Master says: “Except For Your Selfless Self, There is No God, No Brahman, No Atman, No Paramatman, No Master.” That Conviction will appear.

We have so many problems because of the body-form. No one is happy. The only way to escape from all these problems is with spirituality’s help. It is the only way, because Spirit is your Source, your foundation. What do we mean by spirituality? Spirituality is illusion, but through it, we can be free from tension and dispeace, and know who we truly are.

Your Identity is Unidentified Identity, Invisible Identity, Anonymous Identity. It cannot be defined by words. Words are only indicators. This is the base, the foundation of spirituality, for which you must have Conviction. Study the lineage books carefully. You have to read some books. But instead of analyzing the Masters’ words, try to identify, try to understand, what they are trying to convey. Nisargadatta Maharaj is there, and Siddharameshwar Maharaj, and many other saints such as Ramana Maharshi. The great saints have left us their high teachings, so that we can know who we truly are. Spirituality does not exist for us to accumulate spiritual knowledge, and stimulate the intellect. It exists so that we can identify ourselves. This is the meaning of spirituality.

p.strong: 20. What is that Secret Asset?

section.p: “You have a Secret Asset, an Invisible Asset, a Confidential Asset. That You Are!” Find out what it is! Sit quietly for a few moments, and see what happens: just glimpses of “I”, that’s all. Nothing else! This little glimpse of “I-ness” is caught up, and mingled with the body, which first of all causes us to accept the body as our identity, and secondly, drives us here and there, looking for happiness. What is happiness? What is peace? Why do we fear birth and death, and so many other things all the time? There is neither birth nor death. It is because we are measuring ourselves in the body-form that we feel we are going to die. All these concepts have been engraved in us. They have been wrapped around us, suffocating and strangling us since our childhood days.

Don’t read books that will distract you from Reality. There are thousands of books on spirituality. Everyone seems to have written something, according to his own imagination, and those concepts that have conditioned him. Don’t read books that are full of concepts, and descriptions about Ultimate Reality. These concepts will only serve to distract you from Ultimate Reality. Why? Because you are Reality! You do not need books to know yourself. “Look at you!” You know yourself better than anyone! You know that the body is not your identity at all.

You can hold the body, take care of it, and carry out your responsibilities. Don’t sit idly saying, “I am a spiritual man!” Attend to your work, and carry out your duties. You can do it! At the same time, try and concentrate, on that Invisible Concentrator within you, that is Ultimate Truth. This knowledge is very simple knowledge. You are Ultimate Truth. That is your secret asset which is, as yet, unknown to you.

p.strong: 21. What is Reality?

section.p: We are asking the seekers/devotees not to take on any concepts that may distract them from Reality. What is Reality? Everything that you see is illusion. That through which you see is Reality. The body is not your identity at all. “That Through Which You Are Identifying the World, that Invisible Presence, is Ultimate Truth.” In theory, you know that, “I am Brahman, Paramatman, God”. But, theory is never enough! Reading books is not enough. Books are important in the beginning because they give you a foundation, a base. Nevertheless, book-knowledge is insufficient, because it is intellectual knowledge, and dry knowledge. “This Knowledge Should Touch Your Heart, the Bottom of Your Heart, Yes!”

All your illusory concepts will be discarded, only when this knowledge touches you deeply. That way, Reality will be absorbed. We have so many desires. We are roaming, here and there, searching for comfort, happiness and peace. Yet, all these are body-based concepts.

What is Reality? I was not the body. I am not the body. I am not going to remain this body. The Invisible Presence within the body is called Brahman, Soham, I Am That. The Naam Mantra’s purpose is basically to indicate, and remind you, of your Identity at all times: “I am Brahman, Brahman I am.” Considering the sensitivity of the Spirit, this Mantra is very effective in removing all your body-based concepts. The meditation will construct firm and solid foundations. It will help establish Ultimate Truth in you. Meditation is an absolute must! You are not meditating enough, instead, you are giving your attention to second-hand knowledge. You are addicted to literal, spiritual knowledge, bookish knowledge.

Recognize your importance! You are not the body. You were not the body. You are not going to remain the body. You are Almighty God. But at present, you don’t believe that. You are still thinking that God is something different, something separate from you. You are everything. There is nothing, except formless you. But you have split yourself into two, i.e. the body-form, and Ultimate Truth. There is only Ultimate Truth, Ultimate Reality, Oneness. You can call it what you like, for it has no name. You Are That!
The illusion of individuality has created all your problems and confusion. Be simple, be normal, be humble. Don’t think so much! Digest whatever I have told you. Try to digest it.

Life is painful because we have placed so much faith and trust in this body-form. And then we find that the body-knowledge is intolerable, so we develop expectations, needs and requirements. Stop considering yourself as the body-form, and you will know Reality. Stop counting yourself as a body-form! Though you are holding the body, don’t be so concerned with it, or wrapped up in it all.

Slowly and silently, try to dissolve all these illusory concepts. Reciting the Mantra will stabilize you in Reality. Continuity is necessary. You can read books, but don’t accept everything in them. Be selective! Some books create more confusion than clarity. Read I Am That, read Selfless Self – and you will find everything completely clarified.

There are thousands of books. Everyone is encouraging their own variety of illusory concepts: “There is God, Brahman, Atman, and other concepts, to be found in the Shastras, in the Vedas”. The Shastras and Vedas are okay to an extent, but they are not Ultimate Truth. Why? Because your Unidentified Identity is Ultimate Truth. Your Unidentified Identity is Reality.

p.strong: 22. What is illusion, and what is Reality?

section.p: You must find this out. You can discriminate, and separate illusion, from Reality because you are a Master. You are your own Master, the architect of your own life. You are the decision-maker.

You don’t have any connection with this world, and you don’t have any connection with spiritual knowledge. All the requirements, all the needs, absolutely everything, is body-related. The world is an illusion. You are Reality – Formless You! Sift through all the illusion, and discard it. Learn to discriminate and discern.

Who wants peace? Who wants happiness? We need happiness, bliss, a peaceful and tension-free life, all because we are considering ourselves as body-forms. And basically, we are formless. There is no birth, no death, no destiny, no heaven no hell. There is nothing there. To emerge from all the illusion, drop each and every concept, and loosen your attachments to the body-form.
Don’t struggle with the mind. Don’t struggle with anyone else. Be tolerant! Tolerance is a sign of living the spiritual life. Forgive and forget! Have strong courage to accept Reality.

The mind is only a manufacturer of thoughts. The intellect makes a decision, and the ego implements it. It is okay, it is just the bodily functions, but you are separate from all that. You are totally different from that. You are the Master of the mind, ego and intellect. So start behaving like a Master, instead of a slave.

When your illusory knowledge has dissolved, whatever arises, will not cause you any problems, because by then, you will be invincible. You will be super-tolerant, super-courageous. The mind is separate from you. Your Reality is separate from the seen. Your Reality is invisible. You are a Master. Act like a Master!

p.strong: 23. Is duality an illusion?

section.p: Was there any duality, prior to this body-based-knowledge? And, will there be any duality, after leaving the body? We have accepted the illusory, bodily essence as “I am”. “You Are the Holder of the Body, Not the Body.” When you experience duality, it is because the subtle ego, the subtle mind, and the subtle intellect are present. There is, in fact, no duality at all. It is only because we have accepted the body-form as our identity, that we feel this sense of duality.

The Holder of the body has no duality. The Holder of the body, the Sustainer of the body is like the sky, and beyond the sky. But we have compartmentalized everything, named everything, and thus created this duality. We say, “This is my house, and that is the sky”. “This is the ashram, and above it is the ashram sky”. “This is the Bangalore sky, and that is the Mumbai sky”. The sky is everywhere. It does not divide itself into different countries, or places, or bodies, or buildings.

The names are different, that’s all. All these bodies have different names: male and female, but the Spontaneous Existence within these bodies is one and the same. Where there appears to be duality, this means that there is some remaining body-sense still around, “I am somebody”. Dissolve that body-sense! When you consider yourself as the body-form, there is a feeling of duality, but this is illusion. Absorbing Reality is of prime importance. The Holder of the body, is Reality. Absorb this knowledge!

p.strong: 24. What do you mean by identification?

section.p: Identification means being able to identify your true Identity, your Unidentified Identity. The seen is illusion. That through which you see, is Ultimate Truth. You are lacking Conviction, courage, and confidence, all of which are needed to accept the Reality. Even though we are reading spiritual books, we are not reaching the final conclusion, the Truth, which is: “I Am the Principle of This World”. Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God and Master are only words. They serve to indicate the Invisible Listener within you. Reality is not separate from you. What we call Brahman is not in the sky or space. Everything is Within You. We have created language and have ascribed names to everything, such as Ultimate Truth, the Invisible Listener, etc. You accept the names, the concepts, but not the Reality that you are.

We may read all the stories about “Krishna”, but we are not connecting with them. Instead, we take them literally. What is conveyed in these spiritual stories, the principle behind these stories, should impact you. They must move you, strike a blow to your heart, and touch you. When you read the Upanishads, get in touch with the essence. Identify yourself with what is behind the words, so that you recognize the Truth that is conveyed. What is described is your Essence, your Reality. And then, eureka: “Aha! Yes! I Am That”.

Identify yourself! Meditate, keep in touch with your Selfless Self, and then identification will be possible. It will happen. What is Realization? It is simple Conviction, Spontaneous Conviction, that says: “Posing myself as a man or woman, as the body-form is illusion. But, That through which I know myself, that Invisible Presence is my Identity. You are Ultimate Truth. That You Are!”

p.strong: 25. What is Conviction?

section.p: Conviction means “I am not the doer. There is no deed. I am nothing”. Everything came out of nothing, and everything dissolves back into nothing. This mistaken identity of “I am somebody”, which you are experiencing, will dissolve. The concept of the body-form must disappear because it is not Ultimate Truth. The Presence within the body, through which you are acting, is Spontaneous Presence. That you are, just like the sky or the space.

Visitors to the ashram, are always asking the question, “What happens to the body after death? What happens to the Spirit?” You know that death means leaving the body. But, as a matter of fact, there is no death, and there is no birth. Death and birth are concepts that are connected to the body-form only.

Supposing that in a dream, you witness yourself going through the process of dying. And then you witness your death. Just imagine this for a moment! Who is seeing the death of that body? Or, say, you see someone who has died in your dream, but when you wake up, that person is still living. What is true? Is that person alive, or dead? What is illusion? What is Reality? What is true, and what is false? Question yourself. Self-enquire, and you will find all the answers within you.

Your Spirit has exceptional power, and tremendous energy, which you have not yet tapped into. The Master is not separate from you. You are a Master. My Master, Nisargadatta Maharaj, says: “I am not making you disciples, I am making you Masters”. What is stopping the Conviction? It is your long association with the body-form. You are unable to accept Truth, because you are protecting all your concepts with all your might.

Whatever experiences you have in dreams, will disappear when you wake up. Your present life is just like a dream, a long dream. Convince yourself of this! You are your own Master. You are the architect of your life. Don’t encourage body-based questions. Stay with the Conviction. Convince yourself of your Reality because you are your own Master. You are in charge. The mind is always asking, “Why this, why that? Avoid all these questions. Find out what is true! The illusory world and all your experiences? That is all false!

In this illusory world, all the questions that we keep asking, are body-based questions. Nothing has happened. In a dream, you see and experience so many different things, but you don’t ask, “Why is this happening, or why is that happening?” It is a dream! It is false! It cannot be true. Similarly, your present life is not true. As long as there is Presence in the body, you will feel that it is true. After you leave the body, what will happen? There will be no questions, for sure. When we wake up from our dreams, everything disappears. Likewise, when this long dream of life disappears, nothing will remain. Does a dead body have any problems? When the body is buried or burned, what happens to the Spirit? You are the Holder of the body. The Holder is everywhere like the sky. Does the sky die or take birth? Just like the sky has no death and birth, in the same way, your Presence has no death and birth.

You are unborn. You are formless. That Conviction is bound to appear. It is not an impossible goal, but in the beginning, you must try to follow the Master’s instructions, and practice meditation regularly. You must make time for meditation, because without it, your foundations will be weak. This is very simple knowledge. It is free of charge. There is no need for any garlands, flowers or rituals. In India, there are all sorts of rituals: “Do this pranam, or that pranam”. Why? Prior to beingness, did you do any pranams? Did you recite any name, like “Ram Ram Ram”? When did you first hear about Ram?

All this is okay. I am not criticizing it. It is an aspect of faith. I am just asking you to Self-enquire! In a dream, gods and goddesses may appear, but as soon as you wake up, there is no sign of them. Where did they all go? You see many people in your dreams, but then, after waking up, they have all vanished. What happened to them? Did they go to hell or to heaven! [Maharaj chuckles] Nothing is there. There is nothing.

Everything came out of nothing, and everything dissolves within nothing. You must know that! Verify this for yourself. Your Invisible Presence is Reality. Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, The Master is not separate from you. How many times must I keep on shouting the same thing! And still, your crazy mind continues to create endless questions, “Why this? Why that? Why? Why? Why?”

Someone asked a question recently: “When I am meditating, I completely forget everything. But as soon as the meditation is over, my mind starts playing up, and I feel depressed”. I told him that what is going on are just mind-games. In this worldly life, everything is false. Your happiness is false, and your depression is also false. Depression, happiness and blissfulness, all these appear on your Presence. Your Presence is subtle. Does the sky suffer from depression? “Oh, this Indian sky is depressed”, or “the sky in Nashik is depressed!”

You will receive all the answers from within. Ask your Inner Master questions. You will be surprised at first, when the answers start to flow. Make your Master talk! Have a dialogue with your Master. In the beginning, you may not get the answers, but after intensive hammering, you will. And then you will silently exclaim, “Oh I am That!” You don’t have to go anywhere to find answers. With meditation, all your questions will be solved.
After hammering yourself with the Mantra: “I am Brahman, Brahman I am”, or “Soham”, the Whole Truth will open up for you. You will be astonished by your capacity to answer very difficult questions.

Don’t change Masters. People are changing their Masters regularly: this Master, that Master, that other Master. It is meaningless. You are time-wasting because you are not giving any importance to your own Master, the Master within you. The Master is not separate from you. Receive answers from your Master, that is within the human form. The Master of the human form is the Holder, the Sustainer of the body. “That” does not have any specific identity. You cannot imagine, or guess, what it is like. Try to convince yourself, and then the Conviction will arise spontaneously.

p.strong: 26. How will Spontaneous Conviction appear?

section.p: The Spontaneous Conviction will appear after concentrated meditation. Meditation is the foundation, the base. The mind will not accept the meditation practice so easily. It will rebel in different ways, trying to put you off the practice. There will be thought-disturbances, making it difficult for you to sit for any length of time. Whatever happens during your practice, persevere with the meditation, and ignore the thoughts and feelings that arise.

Distractions will become fewer and fewer, if you don’t give them attention. If you pay any attention to these temporary vibrations, it is like adding fuel to the fire. View them as passing clouds, and just let them go.

Strictly follow your Master’s instructions in the beginning. The Master is an enabler. He is like a mirror in which you can recognize yourself, and know Reality. Have strong faith in the Master! You are already a Master, but you are not aware, therefore, an outer Master is needed to guide you, until you have Conviction. After Conviction, you will realize your Masterly Essence. You will be your own Master, and live like a Master.

This physical body is not the Master. The Spirit is talking through this body. The Spirit is listening through this body, but there is no difference between the speaker and the listener. If you have strong devotion and an unwavering faith in the Master, the Conviction will come.

At the moment, you are under the false impression, that you are separate from the Master. This feeling of duality comes from the influence of the body-form. Your whole perspective will change with meditation. When you realize what you are not, all these illusory divisions and separations, and imaginary dualities will dissolve.

After Spontaneous Conviction, there will not be any feeling of division between the Master and the disciple. When you see yourself as formless, and the Master as formless, any sense of separation, that was there previously, will dissolve. There is only Oneness!

All is one! There is only sky! For example, the sky within this ashram, the sky within that house, and the sky within that bathroom, is one sky only. All one and the same. We have erected the walls, and created divisions by naming everything, for our orderly existence in the body-form. But, they are all one and the same. When the walls collapse, ie, when there is the realization of oneness, what is left? Formlessness and omnipresence. Sky is sky!

The Spirit within this body, that body, or in everybody, is one and the same. It is everywhere. That Conviction will appear spontaneously, after reciting the Mantra. I keep reminding you of the wonderful opportunity that you have, to wake up from this dream. But you have become so comfortable and complacent in your illusory dreamworld, that you cannot even see, or value this opportunity.

It is a tragedy that you view the body as an end in itself, as if it is some kind of hedonistic machine. This kind of base existence makes you no different to any other animal. Use your intellect that you have been gifted with, to find out who you are! Recognize that the body is of great value, because it is the medium through which you can identify yourself. Don’t neglect this opportunity! If you do, your illusory concepts will, once more, create another dream. So, use what you have at your disposal, and give of yourself completely, devote yourself to the task of finding out who you are. Take this opportunity with all seriousness. Remove the concepts, before they are set in stone. When old age approaches, it will be much more difficult, even impossible, to shift them.

I am not asking you to neglect your family life, and sit for hours in meditation, no, not at all. Attend to your work. Eat whatever you wish. There are no food restrictions. If your body needs a particular type of food, then have it. The body is a food-body, therefore, keep it healthy. If you like vegetarian food, then eat vegetarian food. If you like meat or fish, then eat meat or fish. There are no dietary restrictions. You are not an ascetic, therefore, there is no need for any self-denial, or fasting, or renunciation. Everything in moderation is good for the body, while anything in excess, is poison. So, don’t worry about your diet! You have nothing to do with the food-body, but you do have a duty to keep it healthy.

Follow the teachings, that is most important. You are to grasp this opportunity with both hands, and take it very, very seriously. You will not be able to remove the concepts when you are older. At present, they are tender, however, if they are established, it will be much harder to shift them. Now is the time. Now is your time! Devote time for yourself. Move closer and closer to Selfless Self, then, the Spontaneous Conviction will appear.

After Conviction, you will be a Master in your own right. I guarantee it! With strong faith in yourself, and strong faith in the Master, Spontaneous Conviction is inevitable. That illusory sense of separation will disappear.

p.strong: 27. What is this body?

section.p: The appearance of the body is a play of consciousness. If there is no consciousness, there is no knowledge. If there is no Presence, there is no experience, experiencer or witness. Convince yourself of this fact. Have some Conviction! If you think about it intellectually, and forget about spirituality for a moment, you will accept the fact that you are basically formless. Intellectually, you know that the body does not have an eternal existence. Who is acting from this form? Who is performing all the activities? The body-form cannot do anything by itself. It is your Invisible Presence that enables all of the body-form’s functions. It is the pure consciousness. Prior to consciousness, there was Presence, which is Invisible Presence, Unidentified Presence, Anonymous Presence, that cannot be defined. It cannot be guessed. It cannot be explained in words.

We need language and words, to communicate thoughts and knowledge. Beyond that, words have no importance. Language has been created by us. There was no language prior to beingness or consciousness. Therefore, I am requesting all devotees to refrain from analyzing the words of the Masters.

I often hear seekers saying, “I don’t understand! This Master says this, and that Master says something different, which sounds completely contradictory to me. Which statement is correct?” Don’t analyze, or compare the different statements made by the Masters. This is a complete waste of your time, and will only cause confusion. You are not analysts! You are not on a course of comparative philosophy, or comparative spirituality. The words are not important. It is the power behind the words that can dispel the ignorance. Focus instead on what the Master is trying to convey. What did Ramana Maharshi, Nisargadatta Maharaj and many other Masters and saints convey?

You are trying to use the mind and intellect to grasp Reality. The mind cannot grasp that which is prior to it. Don’t overuse the intellect. Accept what the Master is placing before you. Let the Invisible Listener listen, and be reminded of its Identity. The Master is showing you your Ultimate Reality, your Ultimate Truth. He is not delivering a lecture for your intellectual stimulation. He is not presenting you with theoretical knowledge, but with pragmatic knowledge, your innate knowledge, Reality.
The Master conveys Truth, your Truth, Universal Truth, Universal Reality. Imbibe it! Don’t dissect it. Disable the intellect, and absorb the knowledge.
You are not a disciple. You are not a devotee. You are a Master. You are a Deity.

p.strong: 28. How is this world illusory?

section.p: When you leave the body, the illusory world will disappear. Nothing is there. There is nothing prior to the body-form, and nothing after the body-form expires. There are no Masters or devotees, deities or experiences. The world is a projection of your Spontaneous Presence. Prior to beingness, prior to a hundred years, how were you? You did not know yourself.

Through the consciousness, when it took the form of the human body, you forgot about your true Identity, your Source. The body-form deluded you into thinking, and accepting, that “I am somebody”. Okay, while you are inhabiting this body, you can use it, but at the same time, there should be Spontaneous Conviction, that you are not that. You know that you have nothing to do with the body because it is not your identity. Basically, you are totally formless.
There is only pure consciousness, without an experiencer, or any experiences. There is just Presence within the body.

We have various practices to lead us to Conviction. The Naam Mantra, meditation, reading books, singing bhajans and listening to the Master, are all useful tools or aids, to bring about Spontaneous Conviction, because you have forgotten your Basic Identity. You are Ultimate Truth, Final Truth, so stop counting yourself as the body-form. If you stay attached to the body-form, and ignore Reality, then, again, there will be the possibility of another dream, like this one. The appearance of the body-form has created all this illusion. It has obscured your true Identity. When the body expires, the world expires.

Just listen to me. I am using words to try and convince the Invisible Listener within you. I am placing before you, your Ultimate Truth. I am talking to the Invisible Listener, not to the body because I know that you are basically formless. There is no difference between the Speaker in this body, and the Listener in that body. The Master and the disciple are only external appearances. But prior to that, there was no Master, no disciple, no deity, and no devotee.

It is all one and the same. The sky is one. When you say, “This is China, and that is Pakistan. This is Russia, and that is America”, you have broken up the sky into parts, and called them by different names. The sky is one. Likewise, we have called the billions of bodies on this planet, by different names: “He is John! That is Jim”, or, “Sandra is over there”. These names are tags, labels for the body-forms, which, as you know, are all illusion!

p.strong: 29. If the Identifier is invisible, how do you identify the Identifier?

section.p: We are talking about the unborn child! Nothing has happened. Nothing is happening. Nothing is going to happen. We are using language to convey your Identity. Don’t let the words trap you. Don’t analyze the words. There is no “identifier”, no “invisible” and no “unborn child”. Everything is within you, without words, without language. Silence, too, is only an indicator. There is no silence.

Everything starts from you, and everything ends within you. There is no road. “Where All Roads End, There You Are.” So stop measuring yourself as the body-form. Hammer yourself with: “I Am Not the Body. I am Ultimate Truth. That Conviction Leads to Ultimate Truth”. It is a fact, but you are not accepting the facts. You are trying to extract spiritual knowledge through your body-based-knowledge. It cannot be done.

There are no spiritual roads. We have created all the roads, all the paths, all the ways, traditions and religions, that are there. There was no mind, no ego, no intellect prior to beingness. There was absolutely zero, prior to beingness.

Were there any roads prior to beingness? Did you know of any “Brahman” prior to beingness? And after leaving the body, where will Brahman be then? It is an open fact that there is nothing, even if you think about it intellectually. Needless to say, “Identification” is also another illusion.

p.strong: 30. If the Seer disappears from the body, what happens to the world?

section.p: What is the fate of all your concepts? What is the fate of Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master, disciple? Everything begins with you, and everything ends within you. Everything starts from you, and ends with you. This [pointing to the body] is a magic box, a miraculous box. All the miracles happen here. No one has the gift to perform miracles. There are no miracle workers. You are the miracle. All miracles take place within you. You are a magician! Don’t underestimate yourself, by taking yourself to be the body-form. You are formless. You are a formless magician.

Again, I am repeating the same thing again: You were formless prior to beingness. You are formless just now. And when you leave the body, you will be formless again. Birth and death are only concepts. No one has any experience of birth, and no one has any experience of death. To have this Conviction, you need to establish a strong foundation. The practice of meditation is essential. Give as much time as possible to it, especially in the beginning.

Previously, the Lineage Masters used to meditate for many, many hours. Now, I am only asking you to meditate for two hours, which you can divide into half-hour slots, if you prefer. You are to spend two hours meditating, until there is Spontaneous Conviction.

Always think about Reality! This is meditation. Remembrance of your Identity is meditation. Contemplate your Reality! Stay with your Reality, at all times. This is true meditation. Keep the practice alive. Question yourself! Have an inner dialogue. Your Master is hidden within you. Talk with Him, demand answers, and then, the answers you have been searching for, will start to flow. Establish this knowledge deep within you. Don’t just sit like a statue, meditating mechanically. Always try to question yourself. Get to know your Inner Master.

Forget about the world. You are the Source. After Conviction, signs of Realization will become evident, like forgiveness and forgetfulness, also tolerance, and a passion to know the Reality. You will not be attached to the world, and you will have complete devotion and trust. Even when unpleasant incidents arise, they will not disturb your peacefulness.

In the past, if someone was aggressive towards you, maybe, you would not be able to tolerate his behaviour. But, after Realization, even if something goes wrong, or does not go according to plan, you will remain at peace, calm and unconcerned. It will be similar to having a bad dream, but, then, soon after, when you realize it was a dream, it no longer bothers you. You can even laugh: “Oh, what was that?”

This life of ours is a long dream. Be firm! “Yes! I am That, I am Ultimate Truth, I am Final Truth. I am All in One. I am Brahman, Master, disciple, devotee. I am the Deity”. This is not imagination, it is a fact. It means that you are Almighty. You are omnipresent, everywhere, just like the space, or the sky. Stay with the profoundness of your knowledge: “That, I am! I am beyond the sky”. Your Identity is beyond the sky. The sky has some limits, but you are limitless.

When I was with Nisargadatta Maharaj, he used to say, “Listen to me!” At that time, we were like babies. We were not able to identify, and know the Reality, because we were immature. Maharaj used to say, “Listen to me! Listen to me!” He was addressing that Reality, the Invisible Listener within us – not the body, or the intellect. Maharaj was addressing the Invisible Listener within us. In this way, Reality was engraved.

In the same way, now, when you are listening, you may not understand what I am trying to convey to you, but, after some time, the penny will drop: “Oh! Master says it is my Truth! It is my Identity, my story, and not the story about any form”. Though you may not be able to understand this knowledge today, it is not going to go to waste. Somewhere within you, this knowledge is being implanted, engraved. The Listener is silently listening. The spiritual plant has been planted. It will grow, as long as you tend to it. You just have to water and fertilize it with the Naam Mantra and your devotion. You can sing the bhajans, or just listen to them. The vibrations, and the lyrics are extremely elevating, and indicate your Identity.

p.strong: 31. You say, that nothing has happened, and nothing is going to happen?

section.p: This whole world is an illusory world. Everything we know is illusion. When the Spirit touched with the body, the world was projected. When the Spirit leaves the body, the world will disappear. Therefore, all the knowledge that we have is illusion, including spiritual knowledge. The Naam Mantra is also an illusion, but it has great value, and will help us to remove illusion.

The Spirit is very sensitive. When the Spirit touched with the body, confusion started. There appeared to be so much happening with parents, society, and the world. You started believing in “I am somebody”. Then you adopted all the concepts. These were engraved in you over a lifetime. You posed as a “somebody”, and tried to live within the circle of illusory concepts. Then life became intolerable and unmanageable. You lived your life within the illusory circle, the circle of illusory concepts. But nothing was really happening because everything is illusion! Nothing has happened. Nothing is happening. Nothing will happen. Along the way, you heard about God, and how He takes care of all human beings. But that identification is not a true identification because the body is not your identity at all.

The Holder of the body is Ultimate Truth. That you are! But you are neglecting yourself, by considering yourself as the body-form. This body is a dead body. The body does not have any identity. You were a small child who became a young man, and then an old man. The body goes through these stages, but you do not go through any stages or changes. You are changeless. The subtle functioning organs of the mind, the ego, and the intellect, are also further layers on your Presence. Meditation and reciting the Naam Mantra will help you to come out of this whole vicious circle in which you find yourself.

p.strong: 32. What is Brahma Dnyan?

section.p: This means, identifying yourself in a real sense. We have identified ourselves as the body-form which is illusion. Knowledge of Ultimate Truth is essential, so that you can return to your original place. You just need to identify yourself in a real sense. Listen to this very simple thing: if you do not wake up in the morning, then there is no one to talk about the world, or about Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God and Master. There is no-one who can talk about anything. In fact, there is no one who can talk! This means that the entire world is projected out of your Invisible Presence. Without your Invisible Presence, there is no life, no action, no movement, nothing, nothing.

In the mornings, we chant “Chidananda Rupa Shivoham Shivoham”. It is a reminder, that everything is illusion: there is no Master, no mother or father, no brother, no sister, no friend, etc. There is nothing. That Conviction should appear within you spontaneously. Then, there will not be any kind of temptation to go searching for Truth, anywhere in the world. The knowledge that everything is illusion, will turn into Conviction, Spontaneous Conviction.

p.strong: 33. Why are there disciples and Masters?

section.p: Because you are unaware. You feel that there is something missing. You do not know that you are Ultimate Reality. You are missing. That something that is missing is yourself. So, the Master says, “There is Nothing Except Your Selfless Self.” There is no difference between the Presence in this body, and the Presence in that body. But you are not accepting the facts because of a lack of confidence.

In spite of your knowing the Reality, you are still posing as something other, “I am somebody”. Be humble, be simple, be normal. Do your duties, do your job. Spirituality is not about rules and regulations, or restricting any activities. It is about realizing that you are already free. Be free!

The disciple is unaware. He does not know, that he is, what he has been searching for. The Master convinces him of his Reality, gives him encouragement, and helps him to remove the illusory obstacles. The Master shows you God in you.

Be normal! Be a part of society. Do normal things. Don’t say, “Oh, I am a spiritual man, how can I eat?” Of course you can eat, because the body is a food-body, and needs food. What is most important is your willpower, and courage to accept Reality. The Master hammers Reality into you: “Except for that Invisible Listener Within You, There is No Brahman”. “Try to Identify the Invisible Identifier Within You.” These are words, but through words, I am trying to hammer the Invisible Listener with the knowledge of Reality: except your Selfless Self, there is nothing. Your Spontaneous Presence is Ultimate Truth, Final Truth.

Be Strong! I am not talking about egoistic strength. The body is an external cover. “I am Brahman”, or, “I am a Master, and you are a disciple”, are only assumed identities. For teaching purposes, I pose as a Master. There is, in fact, no Master, and no disciple.

“I am the Master, and you are the disciple” – No! It is not like that. “The Invisible Listener Within You, and the Invisible Speaker Within This Body, Are One and the Same.” There is no difference. The only thing is that you have forgotten your Identity. I am trying to invite the attention of the Invisible Listener, to remind you that you are Brahman. It is the Ultimate Truth. You are Ultimate Truth. Be firm, and find the courage to accept your Reality. The Master is there to guide the disciple. The Master shines a light, so that the disciple can find his way Home. Without a Master, we cannot identify ourselves, and know Reality. The Master knows all the details that will lead to your Spontaneous Conviction. He was once a disciple himself. Now he has flowered into Masterhood. The same thing can happen to you!

p.strong: 34. Why do we bow to the Master?

section.p: Because of my Master, I am now here, teaching. If I had not come into contact with my Master, I would not be teaching. The Master shows you God within you. The Master makes Masters of His disciples. If it were not for the Master, then we would still be in the dark, in ignorance, worshipping some external God, or other. I would still be visiting different temples, blindly worshipping this God, that God, or some other imaginary God.

God is not separate from you. To identify God, to see God, your Presence is needed. It is because of your Presence, that you are able to identify God. You are the father, and mother of God. It is a fact. The Master shows you your Identity: your Identity is prior to God. We bow to the Master because he is the impersonal, unmanifest Absolute, in manifest form. The Realized Master is free from the confines of the body-form.

The Master is greater than God. He is God’s God. We bow down to the Master because it is only because of him, it is only through Him, that we now know who we are. We are indebted to the Master, and because of this, spontaneous gratitude arises. Bowing to the Master keeps the ego in check, so that we stay humble. Through our reverence to him, we draw closer to our Inner Master.

p.strong: 35. Who, or what, is holding this food-body?

section.p: That Invisible Presence is holding the body. Where was that Presence prior to beingness? What will happen to that Presence? Of that, no one knows. We have so many concepts: last birth, future birth, destiny, and so on, with which we live our lives. All these body-based concepts, are supposed to dissolve completely. For this to happen, you need knowledge and meditation.

Our Presence is beyond our imagination. You can’t imagine how you were prior to beingness, or how you are going to be, after leaving the body. Even if you try your utmost to imagine, or guess, what this Presence is, it will not be that. All you will come up with are concepts. Dissolve all your body-based concepts. You do not have any specific identity. Your Identity is beyond the body, beyond, and beyond everything.

The body-form is not your identity. Your name, mind, intellect, and ego are not your identity. “There was Nothing There, And There is Nothing There.” All these body-based concepts came along with the body, and will dissolve along with the body. Countless concepts were thrown at us since our childhood days. They have left their lasting impressions.

You need a Master to dissolve them. You also need spiritual knowledge. Then all the add-ons, ie, all the body-based knowledge, that is not Ultimate Truth will be removed. And then, you will be totally out of concepts, and out of the circle of body-based knowledge, for good. When this happens, Ultimate Truth will emerge. “How You Were Prior to Beingness, and How You Are Going to Be After Leaving the Body, That Will Appear Spontaneously.” A Master is needed until there is Conviction.
Everything came out of nothing, and everything dissolves back into nothing. Body-based knowledge is unhelpful. Whatever knowledge you have, will die along with the body.

“Reality is Supposed to Be Absorbed Within the Spiritual Body of the Invisible Listener Within You!” When it is absorbed, you will have no concerns at all, even though you continue to live in this illusory world. You will live in a more detached way, without the strong connection to the world, that you used to have. You will attend to your work, and to all your duties, as you did before, but, and here is the big difference, even though you are attending to your duties, there will not be any concept around, of “I am doing this”. That Conviction will appear. All your concepts will dissolve, including rebirth, future birth, and past birth.

“Ultimate Reality, Ultimate Truth Is Not Separate From You.” For you to absorb this knowledge, satsangs, numerous talks, dialogues, conferences, etc, are all essential, until you reach Conviction. After Conviction, all these discussions will be rendered meaningless. If you glance within, you will see that the body is made up of five elements. There is also the mind, the ego and the intellect, as well as the experience of the Invisible “I” that mistakenly considers itself to be somebody.

We are holding the body, measuring ourselves in the body-form. That is not Reality. The Invisible Presence within the body is shapeless, and does not have any specific identity. It is called Unidentified Identity, or Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master. That You Are. But in spite of this knowledge, you are not able to accept your Reality. And so, again you go wandering here, and there, looking to find Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master outside of yourself. Visiting all these different Masters is meaningless. Visit your own Master.

All the saints, including Jnaneshwar, say the same thing: “You are the centre of the world. If there is no Presence, who will talk about the world?” This means that the entire world is projected out of your Presence. Presence is not limited to this body. Presence is in every being. Lord Krishna says in the Gita: “My Presence is Everywhere”. That Conviction will appear.
So, who, or what, is the Holder of the body? It does not have a name. That, you are. To know yourself requires effort, and this is why we insist on the meditation practice.

Why is it so important? Because through it, there is ongoing hammering. You are hammering that consciousness with, “You are formless”, “You are Ultimate Truth”, “You are Brahman”, “You are Atman”, “You are Paramatman”. The Soham sadhana is perfect for erasing all the illusion, and establishing Ultimate Truth.

In our lineage, the recitation of the Mantra is given prime importance. The Naam Mantra has been tried and tested. The Mantra is most important, it acts perfectly. Take the Mantra seriously, for it has great power, and the highest value. Don’t disclose it to anyone else. Use it all the time, because this is your chance to know yourself. Put some effort into the practice at first, and soon, everything will happen spontaneously.

And, whatever happens around you, just ignore it because it has nothing to do with the Holder of the body, that you are! At times there may be some peaceful atmospheres, and at other times, some painful ones. It is of no consequence. It is just like when you wake up from a dream, you immediately know that it was a dream, you will know that you have not done anything because you are not the doer.

Your consciousness has taken birth, and projected a dream world. You are acting in that dream! When you know that it is a dream, you also know that you are not doing anything. Similarly, in this illusory world, when you know that it is an illusory world, all the actions are to be seen as illusory actions. Therefore, don’t give any importance to what you are doing because you know with deep conviction, that you are not the doer. There is neither a doer nor any deeds.

Again, I am repeating the same thing: do not try to define or analyze the Master’s words. What they wish to convey is the most important thing. Your questions are supposed to be practical questions, not theoretical questions. Stop this analysis! Withhold undue comments. This knowledge must be tasted, not analyzed. You have to taste the knowledge. Analysis, arguments, and counterarguments, are all counter-productive. You are to taste the knowledge. Try and ask practical questions.

When Presence touched with the body, the consciousness took possession of your body. You started living as the body, instead of, as the Holder of the body. You accepted illusion instead of Reality. Meditation will reverse the process, and correct the mistake.

p.strong: 36. Who is acting within the body?

section.p: I am pointing out that Invisible Presence within you that is Ultimate Truth. Your Ultimate Truth, your Reality is not somewhere out there in the world. The world is full of glittering attractions, that are there to pacify the body-form. Worldly entertainment is just like painkillers. Their effects will wear off quickly. Try to identify yourself, and then you will not only be pain-free, you will find permanent happiness.

The Invisible Presence acting within the body is Ultimate Truth, Brahman. It is not separate from you. You are the Source, the only Source. So, don’t feel tempted to go elsewhere. It makes no sense at all to travel around India, or anywhere else, in search of Masters. Why go here and there? Today, someone is coming from Rishikesh. He has been travelling in the Himalayas. There is no need for you to go anywhere because your Reality is within you, and within you alone. Why put the body under duress? There is no need to torture your body. This knowledge is very plain knowledge, plain Reality, ClearReality with no frills.

Who is acting from within the body? It is called the Invisible Concentrator. Who is listening? Who is watching? By themselves, the eyes are not watching. Who is listening? Who is watching? Who is experiencing? That Invisible Essence or Invisible Concentrator is called Ultimate Truth. Who is raising all these questions? That Invisible Questioner within you is Ultimate Truth. In the beginning, we are advising you to concentrate on the Concentrator. But at the Ultimate Stage, you need not do this. You need not do anything.

You are unborn. Try to understand how you were prior to beingness. You say, “I don’t know”. And, after leaving the body? You reply, “I don’t know”. That “I don’t know” response means that your Presence is there. Presence is needed for you to be able to say, “I don’t know”. “That Presence is Invisible, Anonymous, Unidentified Identity.”

p.strong: 37. Do we need God?

section.p: There is no need for any gods, goddesses or God. Saint Tukaram said, “All gods and goddesses are imaginary gods and goddesses”. They have taken birth, along with this body. “This Body is Not Your Identity at All.” The business of identifying gods and goddesses came with the body. As a matter of fact, we created these deities. You are not the body, or anything related to it. You are Ultimate Truth. You are Almighty God. Identify God within you. There is no other God but you.

p.strong: 38. Who wants Realization?

section.p: The illusory “I” wants Realization. But, you are already realized. Layers of illusion have covered over your Presence which has created a blockage, a barrier, that has stopped you from knowing yourself in a real sense.

Realization means Conviction. “Bow to That Through Which You Know Yourself.” The consciousness “I” is invisible, formless. You have mistaken your identity, and accepted the body-form as your Reality. As a consequence, there is an egoistic “I” that is influencing, and controlling you. Prior to that “I”, there was only pure Presence.

When you leave the body, where will that “I” be? For you to even say, “I”, Presence is needed. I am talking about that invisible energy within you, through which you can utter, “I”. It has been called by many different names – That you Are! But, the tragedy is that you are not able to accept it because of your long, and over-fond association with the body.

You are nobody. You are everybody. To know this, to absorb this knowledge, meditation is needed. “Concentrate on the Invisible Concentrator Within You.” Don’t take these words literally. This is an indicator that says: “When you concentrate on the Concentrator, then the Concentrator will disappear”. Who wants Realization? The seeker? There is no seeker. Let the fire within you burn away all the illusory layers, and then, you will know, that there is Realization!

p.strong: 39. Who is the Master addressing?

section.p: The Invisible Listener within you. The Master reminds the Invisible Listener of his forgotten Identity. He hammers him with his Reality, his Truth. Who is the Invisible Listener within the body? Who is experiencing all these concepts and thoughts? After knowing the Reality, after having Conviction of this Reality, you will be in the Thoughtless State, with absolutely no thoughts. Even that primary “I”-thought will be rooted out. There is no “I” there at all. “I” does not have any shape or form. These are only words: “I”, “he” “she”, “you” – the medium of language to enable discussion, dialogue and conversation.
The Master is addressing your Inner Master. He is reigniting the fire, that has been covered, with the ash of illusory concepts.

p.strong: 40. “I” am doing this or that. Where is that “I”?

section.p: “I am” is doing this thing. “I am” is doing that thing. “I am” is seeing this and that. Where is that “I”? “I” disappears along with the body. Try to identify that “I”. If there is no consciousness to say, “I”, if there is no Presence, then, there is no-one who can say, “I”.

When “I” was projected, the world was projected. It is all a dream! Stop measuring yourself in the body-form. Be as you were prior to the body-form. You were formless. You did not know anything. There was nothing to do. When you leave the body, you will not be busy with any of your activities. Everything comes out of nothing, and dissolves back into nothing. When that Presence disappears from the body, will your dead body be able to act? Can a dead body tell you anything? There is nothing there.

I am labouring the point, so that you make a determined effort to correct the misunderstanding that you are a somebody. You are nobody, and you are everybody, because all forms are projected from your Spontaneous Presence.

p.strong: 41. Who says, “I am Brahman”?

section.p: These are also concepts. “I am Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God”. They are good concepts, connected with the Superior Ultimate Truth, with the Superior Power Within You. Various names have been ascribed to your real Identity, however, your Identity is beyond any name. For teaching purposes, I describe it as “Unidentified Invisible Anonymous Identity”. That is All! Beyond that, there is nothing.

Strange as it may seem, we need to do a lot of different things, in order to know that there is “nothing”. Knowledge itself, Brahman knowledge, or Atman knowledge, has its own limitations because we are posing ourselves as body-forms. “Basically You Are Formless. There is No Form at All.” The knowledge that you are Brahman is Brahman knowledge. It is limited, because when you say, “I am Brahman”, you are assuming a position, and therefore, taking on ego, when, in Reality, you are formless. Therefore, all our discussion is simply air-talk. We are like air, talking about air. It is not such a bad thing, as these dialogues help you to grow in Conviction.
We are always talking about different aspects of spirituality. We are talking about Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God and Master. The same message is conveyed again and again.

In fact, there is only one message which states without a doubt, that, “You Are the Supernatural Power. You Are Ultimate Truth. You are Final Truth. You Are God”. But, we don’t speak these words out loud. If we utter these words, we will find ourselves back in the ego!

When we say that, “You Are Beyond the Sky”, we are only using the sky, as an example of your formlessness and omnipresence. Therefore, don’t attach yourself to it. How you love your concepts! To be clear, there is no comparison between your existence and the sky. I am simply reiterating what my Master, Nisargadatta Maharaj, said: “If you wish to compare yourself to something, you can compare yourself to the sky. “You Are Beyond the Sky. You are Subtler Than the Sky.”

p.strong: 42. I don’t know why I focus on the darkness, and not the light?

section.p: You are so used to having problems, that it has now become your default setting. You are so used to pain and suffering, that it has even become a comfort zone for some of you. You have been going through life half asleep, and taking the dream for real. The seen is illusion, but the Seer is not. You, however, have been allowing yourself, to be dragged into the ups and downs of the material world. You have been living in a state of constant anxiety, always waiting for the next drama or crisis to appear. Come out of the circle of ignorance! Come out of the darkness! You are not what you have taken yourself to be for so long, a body-form that has been crippled, or paralysed, by the burdens of this world. Come out of the darkness! There is no “you”, and there is no “world”. It is a long dream. It is a long dream. Now it is time to wake up, and step into the light!

When you go deep, and deep, within Selfless Self you will find exceptional happiness there, that is like a kind of spiritual intoxication. This spiritual intoxication is flowing within you. When you taste it, your desires, for sex, fame or money will begin to fall away. You will feel complete, whole and fulfilled.

When you know Reality, Spontaneous Happiness will appear. It is the exquisite fragrance of Selfless Self. Enjoy it! Nothing can stop you from being intoxicated, apart from, a lack of confidence. Accept your Reality, and bathe in the light that you are. With full confidence, say, “Yes! Why not? My Master says I am Ultimate Truth, and therefore, I am Ultimate Truth”. It is simple, without any quibbling. All that is needed is simple acceptance, and trust in yourself, and in the Master. Have some guts! Let the calamities come! Let things happen. Bring it on! You are now out of the darkness of ignorance.

p.strong: 43. How can I identify myself?

section.p: This is a big question! And because we have been living constantly with body-based knowledge, we have become confused. Our minds are rebelling against us. All this illusory knowledge has to dissolve.

How will this body-based confusion dissolve? By no longer identifying with the body-form. Now you know better! Don’t give your attention to the illusory thoughts and concepts. It is like giving attention to the barking dogs. If you give attention to each, and every bark, you will become seriously disturbed. Self-enquire, and accept what the Master is trying to convey. Many devotees and saints were illiterate, and yet, they accepted what their Master said. They had no doubts. Put aside, the mind, ego, and intellect, and accept your Truth. Then, you will be able to identify yourself.

You are accepting this knowledge literally. You are accepting it intellectually, and egoistically. But ultimately, you are not accepting the knowledge, like this: “Yes! my Master says I am Brahman, and, therefore, I am Brahman!” After some time, your ego rises again, and questions the validity of what the Master says: “How can I be Brahman? Brahman is something other. God is something separate from me. God is a higher power administering this whole world.” And by the time you have dissected the teachings, the true essence that the Master is conveying, has been thrown out of the window.

You have developed so many concepts, including spiritual concepts, that you are very attached to, and are sadly, unwilling to surrender. Dissolve all your dearly-held concepts. Your Presence is Ultimate Truth.

p.strong: 44. What do you mean by refreshing our memory?

section.p: Do you have any questions? Any doubts regarding spirituality? If so, just ask. You have forgotten who you are, so we need to refresh your original memory of Reality. Spirituality is nothing special. Forget everything, including yourself. You have a storehouse of memories. You have collected so many memories since you were a child.

Forget all the memories! Dissolve them, because they are illusory, body-based memories of an illusory body-form! You are like a big computer that is full of data, with lots of wrong files, and viruses inside. To remove all these wrong files and viruses, first you have to clean up your computer. When all these files have been erased, the base memory, the substratum will self-reveal: “Except Your Selfless Self, There is No God”. When all the corrupted files have been removed, all that will remain is your original memory.

Forget about spirituality, and think intellectually! What is there? Question yourself, “how was I prior to beingness?” It is a simple question. Your answer is “I don’t know”. Okay, then second question: “how will I be after leaving this body?” The answer is: “I don’t know”. Prior to beingness: “I don’t know”, after leaving the body: “I don’t know”. You don’t know anything except “I don’t know” You cannot know anything, except “I don’t know”.

p.strong: 45. What is the mind, ego and intellect?

section.p: These three always work hand-in-hand, like a trio of bandits. The mind produces thoughts. The intellect makes a decision to implement the thoughts, and the ego puts them into action. The mind, ego and intellect have reduced your status to that of the body-form. They have created so much fear, anxiety, and confusion that you have been controlled like a slave. In brief, you are Almighty God. You are Almighty Brahman. You are Almighty Everything. Don’t count yourself as the body-form. It is such an insult. You are insulting yourself.

You are holding the body which is an external cover. After Conviction, you will not be concerned, or connected to the body. And, when you leave the body, there won’t be any feelings of distress, like, “Oh, I am dying! Oh, do something to safeguard my body!” etc. That thought will dissolve spontaneously. You will let it go! You know that you are not the body, and that it is not your property. This should be your Conviction on your deathbed: “My body belongs to the five elements. Take it away! I do not care for it. I am not bothered”. That Conviction will appear spontaneously, with the result that you will be free of all tension, and totally fearless.

After Conviction, you will not be concerned with the body, the world, and your feelings. Feelings may appear, they will come and go, but you will not be touched by them. Thoughts will come and go. Accept the useful ones, and ignore the rest. The art of living will appear within you spontaneously.

You will no longer be controlled by the mind, ego, intellect. You will be in charge. Behave well! Knowing how to act under certain circumstances, will become clear to you. Nothing is impossible! There is no difference between the Master, and the disciple. There is no difference between the deity and the devotee. These are the concepts. These concepts appear with the human form. The human form itself is illusion. You are beyond that. This illusory world, and what we are posing as, is all illusion. To absorb this knowledge, I will repeat myself again, and stress that meditation is essential.

All our concepts came with the body-form. And now, we have become afraid of them. We have accepted these concepts as “my thoughts” and subsequently, owned them. Therefore, we sometimes feel guilty, or we get irritated. If anything happens against our mind, we feel tense and depressed, “Oh that man is not a good man...”. There is jealousy and envy. Nisargadatta Maharaj often outlined the basics of behaviour: that you should not be jealous of anyone. There should not be any hatred, and you should not hurt anyone’s feelings. Don’t manipulate anyone, by forcing them to act according to your wishes.

The world itself is an illusory world. It is a dream! Prior to a hundred years, you were not there. After a hundred years, you will not be there. “Nothing Came Out of Nothing, Nothing Dissolves Within Nothing.” You know that there is nothing, but in spite of that knowledge, you are still struggling to find something. Bring that struggle to an end. Stop it right now!

You can do it! Reduce the force of the mind, ego, intellect. Capture these bandits! Master them! Don’t let them play havoc with your life. Don’t be their slave any longer. As I have said before, don’t follow the mind, let the mind follow you.

p.strong: 46. What is illusion?

section.p: Illusion is everything that we have ever seen, known, and experienced. The seen is illusion, the Seer, or That, through which you see, is Reality. That Godly Essence is in you. That Masterly Essence is in you. But, you are counting yourself as, “I am somebody. I am going to die”. You are ignoring your Reality. Instead, you see yourself as a weak and limited, frightened, separate entity. This is all illusion. You have reduced your identity to the human-form, and are roaming within the vicious circle of illusory concepts.

There are billions of bodies, but the principle is only One. You are omnipresent! There are many countries and houses, but the sky is One. That “somebody” has to dissolve. You are everybody, and you are everywhere. You are in every being. That Conviction will appear spontaneously with the guidance of the Master, and the help of meditation. There is no somebody. There never was. You are everywhere like the sky or space. All that you take yourself to be, is illusion. Your identity has been formed out of the sum of illusory layers, that were superimposed on your Presence. You have constructed your identity, using the building blocks of illusory concepts. Everything is illusion. But remember also that “illusion” is a concept. There is no illusion. We are just using this concept to discern your Reality.

p.strong: 47. What is sin?

section.p: Sin is also a concept that we have created. Was there any sin at your first birth? Just try to identify where sin came from. You have accepted all these concepts. You did not know any better. You were conditioned. But now that you know, you have to come out of the illusory circle. Rid yourself of all this illusion, and be free! Concentrate on the principle of the teaching: You were not the body. You are not the body. You are not going to remain the body. You are Ultimate Truth. This is the teaching in a nutshell. To truly live by this principle, we have meditation, bhajans and satsangs. They will all help you to regain, and embed, your Ultimate Truth: “Though I Am Holding This Body, I Have Nothing to do With the Body”.

I am repeating the same thing, over and over again. You already have the theoretical knowledge. You now need practical knowledge, which will only come with meditation. There is no Source, but you. There is only One Source! If you

visit many places, and many Masters, you may obtain some temporary relief, but nothing practical, or lasting. There is no alternative to meditation. Meditation will give you a hundred percent relief from all your concepts, including those powerful and loaded concepts, of sin and guilt. These concepts, in particular, have caused untold grief for so many innocent people, who have just accepted, what they were told by religious authorities. And then they carried their burdens of sin and guilt with them for decades. This concept of guilt, is like a cancer that spreads and destroys, all that is around it like wildfire. Forget about sin and guilt! Throw them out, and dump them with the rest of the garbage. They are nothing but concepts that have been used to control the masses.

Sometimes, visitors will say that their Masters have cursed them! This illusion has caused them to become fearful and anxious. The fact is that nobody can curse anyone. These are imaginary concepts. The mind creates untold problems. The Masters are very kind. They are just like the space, sky, or the wide ocean. In order to curse someone, there has to be an individual. There are no individuals. Can the Indian sky curse the Chinese sky? Don’t become a victim of your ideas and imagination, or those of anyone else.

Sri Bhausaheb Maharaj insisted on meditation practice. Through many years of experience, he knew that the flower of Self-knowledge would not open without meditation. You may have gathered so much theoretical knowledge, but you still do not have any practical knowledge. You must dig deep, and then, the knowledge will open up within you.
