All the authentic Masters are right. Everything that they say is correct. They are all communicating “Perfection”. But what do we do? Immediately, we start analyzing their words, and complain that one Master’s statement, contradicts another Master’s statement. That analysis should not take place. All the Masters wish to convey is one principle, the same principle, and that is: “Except your Selfless Self there is no God, no Brahman”. You are to accept this conclusion. Don’t analyze it. This is not a debating society!

p.strong: 142. “Oh, I am a spiritual man, how can I spend time with my wife, my father, my parents?”

section.p: This kind of talk is nonsense talk! Our spirituality is practical spirituality. Do your duties, whatever they may be. Be normal! You have family responsibilities. Look after your loved ones! Visit your parents. Family life has nothing to do with spiritual life, but at the same time, you are to be humble, normal and practical.

If you are hungry, you need to eat something. You can’t avoid it by saying, “Oh! I am a spiritual man, I cannot eat”. That is theoretical nonsense, and illusory talk! Be practical! Ask yourself, “What exactly do I want?” The answer is, “I want to identify myself”. It is a fact that the body is not your identity at all, so you need to discover, and find out what your identity is. Remove all the layers that are stopping you from knowing yourself.

p.strong: 143. What is the use of this knowledge?

section.p: What is the use of this knowledge? Suppose you were to read thousands of books. This activity may well make you a Master of words, of spiritual words, but it will not make you a Master of your Selfless Self. You are to be a Master of your Selfless Self, in this way: “I am not a man, or a woman, I am totally formless. Since I am formless, there is no death and birth, no future, no past, no destiny”. It is a fact. “Your Presence is Just Like the Space, or the Sky.” The sky does not know anything. Likewise, “Your Invisible Presence is Just Like the Sky or Space”.

Dissolve all your concepts! This is the principle of spirituality. Be firm! Visit Yourself! Don’t keep travelling, and going here, today and there, tomorrow, looking for knowledge. By all means, visit different places, but without the expectation, of finding happiness or peace. You won’t find happiness anywhere else, except within you. Happiness and peace are already within you, but you are unaware. We have become victims of our mind, ego and intellect. Use them appropriately, but don’t become their victim.

p.strong: 144. Some people want to become sannyasins

section.p: What is a sannyasin? It is someone dressed in colourful robes, wearing lots of necklaces, and neglecting his responsibilities. This is not a sannyasin. Throw out all your concepts! Instead of decorating the body, decorate your Inner Master. Try to find your Real Self. It is not difficult at all. But, we are not giving ourselves enough attention. This is the problem. We still have some mind, ego and intellect influencing us. The mind is very tricky, manufacturing so many thoughts.

Stop swimming with the thoughts, and going along with them indiscriminately. Okay, having thoughts is the nature of the body because the body belongs to the five elements, but your Identity is an Exceptional Identity, through which the entire world is projected. It is not limited to the body.

Taking on a new identity, any new identity, whether it is a new spiritual name, or becoming a sannyasin is meaningless. Find your true identity! We are trying to remove the layers of clothing, not put new ones on! Try to identify yourself in a real sense.

p.strong: 145. Is your Master realized, or not?

section.p: People often ask the question, “Is your Master realized or not?” What concern is it of yours? The mind asks unnecessary questions. Instead, find out whether you are realized or not, and how to realize. Instead of talking about others, talk about your Selfless Self.

Try to identify yourself, and see whether you are realized, or not. Ask the question, “Am I realized, or not?” Presence has no duality. Presence is everywhere. Sky is sky. Teach yourself, and then become your own Master.

Instead of wasting your time trying to find out if so and so, is, or is not, realized, make yourself powerful and indomitable! Find the answers from within. Let the answers reveal themselves to you. You are perfect. You are the central point of this world. Don’t ignore that. I am placing before you the facts.

p.strong: 146. Reading books and dry discussion will not serve your purpose

section.p: When you read various spiritual books, and approach the Masters, or travel to various sacred places, all these activities are meaningless, unless they lead to identification. These are physical activities, and, therefore, will not help you. “Try to Identify the Invisible Listener Within You.” The Invisible Listener in You is your Reality. This is what I call the principle of spirituality. You do not know yourself.

Approach your Selfless Self. The Master, Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, etc, are not separate from you. Because you are measuring yourself as the body-form, you are under the false impression, that Reality is to be found outside of you. It is only within you. Meditation alone, will enable you to identify yourself in a real sense. Reading books, and dry, spiritual discussions, are all unnecessary exercises. It is more important to find out, who is reading the books? And, who is discussing spirituality?

What is the use of all these books? “Have You Ever Read the Invisible Reader Within You?” Mmh? You are travelling all over the place, looking for answers, and hoping to find them, from various teachers and Masters. Question yourself! The answers are within you! It is only you, and you alone, who can answer your questions because the Invisible Questioner is the Answer.

There must be a conclusion! Don’t just keep reading, reading, reading ad infinitum. Reading books in this way is nothing but an intellectual exercise. Spiritual books are only indicators. They point to your Ultimate Reality, your Ultimate Truth, but they are not your Ultimate Reality, your Ultimate Truth. Ultimate Truth is not to be found in books, or Masters, or in sacred sites. Why? Because “You Are Ultimate Truth.”

What have you achieved from all your reading? You must know, otherwise, it has all been a waste of time, a meaningless exercise. Question yourself: “Where do I stand?” “What is my position?” When you read books, and listen to various Masters, what you are doing is accepting second-hand knowledge, someone else’s concepts. This will not help you. It will not serve your purpose. It will not lead you to Self-Identification. Question yourself! Self-enquiry leads to Self-Knowledge, and Self-Knowledge leads to Self-Realization. You must know yourself directly – not through words.
Ask yourself: “What exactly do I want?” You are no different from anyone else. The human body-form looks for a peaceful, happy, fearless and stress-free life.
We all carry with us a fear of death because we identify with the body. When we come to know that we are not the body, that fear simply dissolves, along with all the other concepts.

Carry out an investigation! Find out what is the value of the body? Does it have any value? Try to find the “Holder” of this body, the Power, the Life Force that sustains the body. Without Presence, your body is a dead body! Identify yourself! Read the Reader! You must find out “Who am I?”, by diving deep within your Selfless Self, through meditation. The principle of spirituality states: “Except Your Selfless Self, there is no God, no Brahman, no Atman, no Paramatman, No Master”, because You Are A Master, You Are Paramatman, You Are God Almighty!

The purpose of spirituality is to help you identify yourself in a real sense. You are identifying everybody, and everything, in the world, except your Selfless Self. Identify your Selfless Self! Because the body is not your identity, and was not your identity, and will not remain your identity, therefore, whatever is accepted through the medium of the body, is illusion. Please try to know yourself. Try to identify yourself. That is the base, your foundation, which can only be established with meditation. Meditation is the medium through which you can identify yourself.

p.strong: 147. What is the point of counting beads?

section.p: Counting beads is meaningless! Reciting “Ram, Ram, Ram”, or “Hanuman, Jai Hanuman”, “Jai Ram, Jai Ram”, is a waste of time. Prior to beingness, do you think there was any “Jai Ram, Jai Ram, Jai Ram chants”? The Spirit is tempted to count the beads and chant, “Ram Ram, Ram”, but “I Am Inviting the Attention of That Spirit Within You That is Itself Ram!” Ram is not separate from you. When you use these beads, you are not doing anything but exercising your fingers!

Religion teaches that Brahma, the Creator God, gave birth. Then, Vishnu came as the Protector, to supply food, and take care of the bodies. And then, Shiva came along as the Destroyer. So, we have the God of death, the Shiva-God, the caretaker, Vishnu, and the birth-giving Brahma. The important question here is: “Who gave birth to Brahma? Who is Brahma’s Father? Vishnu is taking care of you, but who is taking care of Vishnu? And then, what happens to the “God of death, Shiva? Who takes his soul, when his time ends after death?

These are the concepts developed by religion. It is a purely imaginary story. In a similar way, we develop imaginary concepts that influence, and pressure us. You are to discard all these concepts. There is no reasoning or logic to all these stories, rituals, pastimes. “Ram Ram, Vishnu, Vishnu”, etc, all these are concepts – a total waste of time. Find out where you stand. Reach a conclusion, and bring an end to your drifting.

p.strong: 148. Nisargadatta Maharaj said, “Don’t mix with such elements which will distract you from Reality”. What did he mean?

section.p: Nisargadatta Maharaj was referring to keeping bad company. If you mix with the wrong sort, there will be confusion. I have told you that you are Ultimate Truth. Then, after leaving here, you meet other teachers, or Masters or seekers, who say, “No no, you are not Ultimate Truth. Brahman is separate from you”. They are trying to confuse you.

You need to convince yourself, and be convinced by your Master: “Yes! My Master says that I am Brahman, therefore I am Brahman! I am Ultimate Truth!” There is nothing more. If you listen to anyone else, everything will be undone, and you will enter once more, into the confusion field.

You must have strong willpower, and a sacrificing nature, so that you will resolutely accept: “Yes, my Master says I am Brahman, I am Brahman”. It is your Unidentified Invisible Anonymous Identity. Simple! Prior to beingness, did you know anything? Nothing! When you leave the body, will you know anything? Nothing! What is the purpose, and use of all this knowledge?

Think seriously, even intellectually, and try to convince yourself. Your Self-Conviction is most important. The Master has given you various clues. You are to accept what He says. You are to think seriously. It is a fact that you are not the body. It is a fact.
“Don’t be distracted by the elements” means don’t accept the illusory thoughts that are flowing, inside and outside. Be there, and there only.

You have been told the Truth. “You are Brahman, Ultimate Truth, You are Brahman, Ultimate Truth”. You have seen the Ultimate Truth, you have recognized the Ultimate Truth: “Except for Selfless Self there is no Brahman, no God, nothing! What more do you want?

Whether the body-identity is there or not, “You Are There, And There Only”. Prior to this bodily identification, nothing was known. The unknown only becomes known through the body. The unknown disappears along with the body. And, the body is not your identity.

A small child becomes a young man, then an old man. And one day, he is destined to leave the body. Therefore, the body is not your permanent identity. There is no death, no birth. You are unborn. The building may collapse, but the sky remains. You are subtler than the sky or space. So, have the courage to accept your Identity, your Reality. If you have strong courage to accept the Reality, nothing will disturb you.

Sometimes, friends try to put people off from listening to the Master. Ignore them! Don’t listen to them. Don’t give any cognizance to such types of atmosphere. Forget it! Forget and forgive, just like Jesus says, “Oh God, forgive them, for they know not what they do”.

Any doubts? There should not be any doubts because all the doubts, and all the questions, are related to body-based-knowledge. It is a very simple thing, an open fact that: “The Body is Not Your Identity. The Body was Not Your Identity. The Body is Not Going to Remain Your Identity”. So, all this knowledge of Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master, maya, and all these concepts, have created a background, but you are totally separate from all that. “The Presence Within This Body is Subtler Than Space or Sky.” But because that “Presence Touched with the Body”, you started saying “I”. That form is taking place. Prior to the touch with the body, there was no form. Basically, “Prior to Beingness, You Are Totally Formless.” It is an open fact, even if you think about it intellectually. After leaving this body, you will be formless.

When you are formless, there is no thinking, and no thoughts. There is no knowledge, no words like Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master. All these man-made words came along with the body only. There is no desire, there are no demands, there is no anything! “There was Nothing Prior to Beingness. Nothing was There!” Everything came along with the body. All your desires, needs, requirements, happiness, peacefulness, etc, all these words came along with the body.

All these concepts did not exist prior to beingness. Even that “I” concept was not there. After leaving the body, that “I” concept will dissolve. All your precious knowledge will disappear, along with the body.

Where is the question of death and birth? Where is the question of rebirth? These questions are there because we have been brought up with various concepts, and are influenced by them. Come out of this circle of concepts! Discard everything, and don’t be distracted again!

p.strong: 6 TROUBLESHOOTING

p.emphasis: “Behind painfulness, there is blissfulness. Behind the dark, there is light. You are always thinking about darkness. Why don’t you think about brightness? It is very interesting, if you go deep and deep, you will find exceptional happiness, “Oh! It is spiritual intoxication”. It is just spontaneous happiness. You can enjoy it! ‘My Master says I am Brahman, therefore, I am Brahman!’ Accept it! There is nothing else. Grow in confidence! Let things unfold! Let the calamities happen!”

p.strong: 149. I don’t understand the second part of the Mantra. Are the syllables of the second part, the reverse of the first part?

section.p: Yes, correct. It is: “I am Brahman, Brahman I am”. “I am Brahman”, and the reverse, “Brahman I am”. It is very easy, very simple. Both parts are influencing the Invisible Listener, the Meditator within you, that you are Ultimate Truth. But don’t analyze the Mantra. Don’t apply the so-called intellect to the practice. Just do it very easily, and simply. Be simple, be normal, and be humble!

p.strong: 150. When I recite the Mantra, my mind is always trying to hold onto something

section.p: If you find it difficult to concentrate, then you can picture the form of the Master. This may help you to focus better and recite the Mantra. Don’t try too hard! Don’t put in so much effort! Keep the use of the intellect, the mind and the ego to a minimum.

The Spirit is sensitive, and it will absorb what is impressed upon it, with great ease. You can identify yourself through the Naam Mantra. We are identifying ourselves in the human form, when basically, you are formless. There is no form, and therefore, no death, or birth. Just recite the Mantra, and after a while, you will feel the effects, some vibrations. After continuous recitation of the Mantra, after concentrating on the Invisible Concentrator, your existing appearance will disappear. Reality will open up within you.

p.strong: 151. I already have a mantra. If I take your Mantra, does this mean that, I am starting all over again from the beginning?

section.p: If you wish to change your mantra, then there is no problem. Om Namah Shivaya, or other mantras are not wasted. Through that knowledge, through that sacrifice or devotion, you came to me. So, it is not wasted. You are not starting all over again.

Nowadays, direct knowledge is quite rare. Teachers will take you round and round in circles. This a direct approach, without any expectation. I am not expecting anything from anyone else. Be realized, and make others realized. Be enlightened, make others enlightened. This is straight knowledge.

Normally, in our lineage, we do not give the Naam Mantra immediately. But I am very liberal. Some of you have travelled long distances to be here, so, with sympathy, I am trying to give the Naam Mantra. But I have found, that many people who come here, then go elsewhere, to see another Master, and to possibly receive another mantra. They are spoiling their spiritual career.

p.strong: 152. In the first two or three months, after receiving the Mantra, I couldn’t concentrate on the meditation, there was a lot of confusion and depression

section.p: In the beginning, the mind will rebel against you. There will be some laziness, depression, or nervousness. But don’t abandon the meditation because of all this. It is actually a good sign. It means that the meditation is working. The medicine that has been given to you is having an effect. Those things that are not needed or wanted, are beginning to leave, just like when you get rid of the tenants from your house, when you no longer want them there. As they are leaving the house, they may hurl abuse in your direction, because they have been long-standing tenants. They are attached to their homes, and don’t wish to leave.

In a similar way, there are so many wrong, and illusory concepts in the body, that, they will rebel against you, as they depart! The mind used to control you. Soon, you will be a Master of the mind! Follow the meditation. It is very simple. You are to devote some time for yourself. In the beginning, we ask for one, two, or three hours. The more you do, the greater the benefits. And then, after some time, it will be spontaneous meditation. Even when you are in deep sleep, the meditation will continue.

This body is called a “man”. I am not thinking, “I am a man, I am a man, I am a man”. This body has been given some name, “Ramakant”. In deep sleep, I don’t keep thinking, “Oh, I am Ramakant”. The point is that, that word, “Ramakant” is very, very close, and has become one with this body. Similarly, the word, “Brahman” is supposed to resonate very close, with your Selfless Self. When that Oneness occurs, you will forget everything. Keep reciting the Naam Mantra until this happens.

The Naam Mantra is to be repeated, until you reach the level of Spontaneous Conviction, “I am Brahman”. I will say this again, Naam Mantra meditation is necessary till the Spontaneous Conviction arises that, “I am Brahman”, without any experience. At this time, you will find that even “I am Brahman” is also a concept. This is direct knowledge. It has become complicated by layers. This is a direct approach. Therefore, the summation of spirituality is: except your Selfless Self, there is no God, no Brahman, no Atman, no Paramatman, no Master. You are to accept That Reality, that Ultimate Truth. Keep hammering with the Naam Mantra, “I am Brahman. Brahman I am”. Keep impressing! Keep hammering! “Yes! I am Brahman, Brahman I am”. And see the humorous side of it all! That Reality will open within you. Enjoy!

p.strong: 153. I took the Mantra, and it has no effect

section.p: It is not like that! Suppose you were watering a row of plants. You pour water at the side of the plants. It absorbs the water and begins to flow towards the rest. The water does not flow immediately. With the Mantra, it is the same. You cannot expect instant results. It all depends on your involvement, and how serious you are taking it all. Don’t take it casually. The Mantra will remove all the layers that have appeared upon your Presence. There are so many layers there, that they are not all visible. They are not so easy to detect.

It is a little like a fire that is covered with ashes. After removing these ashes, you will see that there is a fire burning underneath. Your energy, your fire, is covered with so many concepts. The Mantra works to clean, and remove these concepts. The Mantra will purify everything. It has tremendous power! The role of the Mantra is to remove all these things. It is like a spiritual broom. It is like a spiritual duster that makes everything vanish. But you must have some patience. Don’t consider yourself as handicapped in any way, and doubting whether anything will happen. Remember that nothing is impossible!
The human body is not your identity at all. Accept that reality, your reality! It is a fact. You are not accepting it because of the impressions from body-based knowledge. Dissolve those impressions!

p.strong: 154. That Conviction is not happening to me

section.p: That Spontaneous Conviction is within you. The Conviction is already there, but “You are missing”! You are already there, but you do not know that you are. There is already Enlightenment. There is already Realization, but you do not know, because you are layered with so many concepts. You have become a victim of so many body-based concepts.

p.strong: 155. I face so many difficulties, how can I concentrate, and just be the witness?

section.p: Everyone has some degree of tension, even small children. Problems are bound to be there because you are holding the body. Meditation will help you. There are so many difficulties, when you are holding the human body. There are concepts, impressions, doubts, tension, fear, depression, etc. Spirituality will help you overcome these difficulties. Meditation will make you less concerned about problems and difficulties. It will gradually melt away all your illusory problems.

Conviction leads to Realization. Spontaneous Conviction leads to Realization, enlightenment. When this happens, you will remain unconcerned with the body-form and its difficulties. The body-form causes lots of problems. Even saintly people have their share of problems, but they do not give so much importance to them.

Spirituality helps you to be unconcerned about the body. After Conviction, you will have strength, full strength and power. That power will be there, and will help you. That energy, that invisible energy will help you. Don’t worry, your problems will all be negligible ones, after Conviction.

p.strong: 156. Every time I feel closer to Selfless Self, it is, as if something comes in the way

section.p: This happens because you are holding the human body, and under the pressure of a lot of concepts. Keep the practice going, and ignore any interruptions. Melt all these concepts!

Dissolve them! Then, you will be totally separate, and independent from them. Have Conviction: “I am nothing to do with body-based-knowledge because I am formless”. That Conviction will appear spontaneously from within. At that stage, you will not be concerned with the world, the body-knowledge or the spiritual knowledge. You will not be concerned with Brahman, Atman, God, Paramatman, Master, either.

Spiritual knowledge is important while you are holding the body. When the body disappears, spirituality disappears, Brahman disappears. So, when the time comes to leave the body, there should not be any fear around. There should not be any concept around of, “I am somebody”. That has to be melted.

The impressions and impacts on the human body are so strong that, in spite of your knowing everything, you are not able to accept it. In order to accept your Reality spontaneously, you need to recite the Mantra and meditate. Give the maximum time you can to meditation.

Now concentrate on your Mantra, and on your meditation, which will help you. You have to stand on your own feet, and not depend on your Master. Stimulate your own Master within you. The Master is not separate from you. The Masterly Essence is within you. Therefore, Nisargadatta Maharaj says, “I am not making you a disciple, I am making you a Master”.
You are already a Master. “Disciple” is the name given to the identity that does not know itself. When the real identity is known, you are a Master.

p.strong: 157. I have the feeling that I am coming closer and closer to my Selfless Self, but then I fall…

section.p: Don’t feel it! It is spontaneous action. Why feel? Are you feeling, “I am a man, I am a man, I am a man”? Just concentrate on the meditation to discard all this confusion, and all these illusory concepts. Meditation is the only medicine for you. It is the only treatment for your malaise.

The mind, ego and intellect are there, and can easily cause problems. So, use them sparingly, not more than is necessary. All your questions and difficulties come from a weakness of your mind, and a lack of confidence and courage.

To regain your memory, your strength, your power, and your energy, you are to undergo strict meditation. Meditate until you get Spontaneous Conviction. The mind may not accept it initially, but if you persevere with it, that will bring an end to the mind, the ego and the intellect.

Don’t become a victim of anyone’s thoughts. What is Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master, maya, etc? Everything is maya. Nothing is true. Nothing has ever happened. Prior to beingness, you are Brahman. At present, you are Brahman. When you leave the body, you are also Brahman.
The sky is in this temple. Prior to its construction, there was the sky. After demolishing this building, the sky will be there. The sky has never changed.

You need to transform your body-based knowledge. You are not accepting this Reality. The mind continues to catch you off-guard, and distract you from Reality. Don’t become a victim of anyone’s concepts, anyone’s thinking. Make your own decisions: “Yes I know!”.

If you want to ask questions, you can ask any question. You must be clear. Make everything clear for yourself. Nothing is impossible. The entire world is an illusory world. Shankaracharya repeatedly says, “To say “I” is illusion, to say “you” is illusion, to say Brahman is illusion, the entire world is illusion”. In an illusory world, God is also an illusion, as well as the Master and the disciple. Everything came out of nothing, everything dissolves in nothing. All our needs, requirements and desires came afterwards. Have some Self-confidence: “Yes I can do it!” It appears as an egoistic statement, but it is necessary in the beginning.

The saints have the same Spirit which you already have. The only difference is that they recognized their importance, while we are not recognizing our importance. Place your hand on your own head, mmh? Self-blessing is required – No God-blessing is required! You are to please yourself. You are to take the favours and boons from yourself. Behind painfulness, there is blissfulness. Behind the dark, there is light.

p.strong: 158. I am far too attracted to women…

section.p: Presence is neither male nor female. These bodies are human bodies. Where is the happiness in these bodies? Can this body have any appearance without Presence? No! The body cannot appear without Presence. Supposing for a moment, that you saw a beautiful lady standing next to you. Without Presence, there cannot be a beautiful lady there at all! There is only a dead body!

As long as we are measuring ourselves in the body-form, and considering ourselves to be men or women, we will have that attraction to other men and women. What is a man? What is a woman? Dead bodies! There are male and female bodies, but the Holder of the body, is neither male nor female. As long as you are under the illusion of, “I am a man”, this attraction will continue. It will distract you from your Reality.

You are neither a man nor a woman, “You Are Brahman”. When that Conviction appears, that attraction will dissolve. We feel attracted to other body-forms, because all the time, we are accepting that, “the body-form is our identity”.
So, unless that body-identity dissolves, you will not be able to know yourself, and happiness will elude you.

What is happiness? Where does it come from? Does sex give you happiness? Or, money? Or publicity? These are temporary things. You know that any happiness gained from these material sources is only fleeting. Sex, money, and fame are all temporary sources of happiness, They will give you pleasure for a few moments, that is all.

When it is your time to leave the body, will these material, pleasure-giving sources be available to you? Not at all! “Know Your Greatness!” All the happiness that you have experienced is of a temporary nature because it is sourced from the illusory world. Many, many different material causes, have given you moments of happiness, but never anything lasting.

Fidel Castro of Cuba was known for his womanising nature. He had forty thousand ladies! He had a big appetite! A lot of sexual attraction! What kind of happiness did he get? And what happened to that happiness, after he left the body? Think about it! We are not really thinking! Many people have a lot of money. Are they happy? No! Many people are very famous. Are they happy? No! These are not the causes of happiness.

Who wants happiness? Does the body want happiness? If there is no Presence, can the dead body experience any enjoyment? Can a dead, male body enjoy a dead, female body? Can a dead body enjoy money, or publicity? Think about it! You are not thinking about these things. You are simply going through the motions like an automaton, in search of one pleasure after another. What is True Happiness? Where is this True Happiness? All the answers are within you. All the questions, and their answers, are within you, and within you alone.

True happiness is your nature. It is permanent, and causeless. When you identify yourself in a real sense, and have the Conviction that you are not the body-form, then, you will stop looking for happiness from material sources. Your attractions and attachments will begin to lessen, and then, dissolve completely. “You are the Source of Happiness.”

When the concepts have dissolved, and all the garbage has been removed, there will be a feeling of expansion, formlessness, and vastness. And with that opening, there will arise exceptional happiness, lasting happiness. This happiness is your nature. It is permanent, eternal, and causeless.

Think about what I have told you just now! Read the books of the lineage Masters. Read Selfless Self. After reading all these books, establish your position. Reach a conclusion! Know and accept that: “Except for your Selfless Self, there is no God, no Brahman, no Atman, no Paramatman, no Master”. This is the principle of spirituality.

p.strong: 159. We feel very good when we hear these talks. Why does this not last?

section.p: Because the illusion is stinging you again. The mind is pricking you from the backside. What do I mean by saying this? See, this body is called a man, or a woman. Do you forget that you are a man or a woman? No! You have accepted that your body is called a man, and, therefore, you live as a man. In dreams, you also appear as a man. Likewise, the Master says, “You are neither a man, nor a woman. You are Brahman”. Why not accept that? Try and absorb these Talks. Remember the teachings! Keep them close to your heart. And meditate! You cannot identify yourself without meditation. You cannot absorb this knowledge without meditation. You are wavering because you have not accepted your identity, and therefore, you keep getting pulled back into illusion.

p.strong: 160. If some illusion or dream arises, should I try to stop it with the Mantra?

section.p: Don’t do anything deliberately. “I will stop it. I will do it”. No! Don’t think like that! All your actions are supposed to be spontaneous actions, not deliberate ones. When the knowledge begins to flow, and you listen to your Inner Master, you will receive spontaneous instructions that will guide you in your actions, in all circumstances.

At present, you are employing the mind, the ego, and the intellect to guide you in your thinking processes. After Conviction, you will receive the answers to your questions from within, spontaneously, without the mind, intellect and ego. Your difficulties will be resolved spontaneously, without any deliberate effort on your part.

Your question at the moment, “should I record these thoughts, should I do that?”, demonstrates that you are back in the ego. You are taking on ego, and over-using the intellect. You are trying to do something, with the help of the mind. That is duality!

“Don’t Think Anything. Don’t Plan Anything. Don’t Do Anything.” Just wait and watch. Watch and wait! And you will see, that when you have a big question, a pressing question, some problem that needs a quick resolution, you will get your answer instantly!

“This is Called the Last Devotion, Atma Nivedanam Bhatki.” You are interacting with your Selfless Self. “There is No Body, No Mind, No Ego, No Intellect.” Without these subtle organs, some spontaneous feelings will appear upon your Presence, and you will receive a reply to your questions. You will receive the guidance you need, to manage each and every circumstance.

So, don’t do anything deliberately. There is no question of duality because “Your Presence IS, Without Thinking”. Your Presence is a Spontaneous Presence. It is only because that Presence touched with the body, that “I” appeared. If that touch of Presence and the body did not occur, there would not be an “I” a “you”, “he”, “she”, “it”. And, no Brahman, No Atman, No Master because nothing is there. There is nothing!

At the moment when Presence or Spirit touched, or clicked with the body, you started to say, “I”. Then, instantly, when you felt “I”, a glimpse of “I”, the world was projected. And then, when you leave the body, that projection of the world will dissolve. So, as I have repeatedly told you: “Everything Came Out of Nothing, Everything Dissolves Within Nothing”.

Don’t act deliberately. Don’t think deliberately. “Remain As It Is.” The saints say, “Without any thinking, “Be As It Is”. Without any thought, or any thinking, instructions for you will come from within. So, “Be As It Is Without Thinking”.

Prior to beingness, were you planning anything? “I will do this thing, or that thing?” And after beingness, after you leave the body, will you be planning anything? You are to establish yourself, without any identification whatsoever. When you are not identifying yourself, this is the way you were prior to beingness. And That is your position. It is your place of origin. Your Original Place! This is the Stateless State. “That Position is Supposed to be Established.” Be as it is! Everything will unfold and happen spontaneously, so, don’t try to do anything. Don’t think, and don’t plan anything. Nothing needs to be done with your deliberate action. This kind of spontaneous living will come with practice. Meditation, reciting the Mantra, absorbing the knowledge, staying with Selfless Self at all times, all this is most important. You have a lot of theory, but the practice is weak. Start today, with determination and courage!

p.strong: 161. When I meditate, a lot of thoughts are coming up. How do I make the mind still?

section.p: Don’t stress your mind! Don’t give so much importance to the thoughts. No stress!

Listen to me! In the beginning, I will take care of you. Do not worry about it. Since you have come here, I will make you perfect. Nisargadatta Maharaj says: “I am not making you a disciple. I am making you a Master”. You have come here as a seeker, or devotee, and you will leave here as a Master.
Convince yourself: “Yes, I am a Master. My Master says that I am a Master”. Live like a Master. You are the owner of this world. Okay?

The mind is a constant flow of thoughts. As these thoughts arise, you recognize what’s going on. You identify some thoughts as “good”, and others, as “bad”. You discriminate between them. Let the thoughts come! Accept those that may be useful to you, and reject the rest.

Forget about the mind! You are a Master, therefore you are in charge. Forget about the world because it is illusion. It is projected out of your Invisible Presence. Be brave! Nothing is impossible. Meditation practice is most important because it will give you a lot of courage and energy. Mantra Meditation is not just about a few simple words. Behind these words there is a lot of power, that creates inner vibrations. It creates a spiritual energy within you, that enables you to accept Reality more easily.

p.strong: 162. When there are challenges, can I still stay with the sense that my real identity is Selfless Self?

section.p: Yes, correct! Autumn comes, then winter. These are the seasons. They come, and then, they go. You do not come and go. You are there, and there only. Be solid, be very firm, so that no one will dare try to attack, or influence you, in any way. I am telling you: nothing will attack you! You will be strong enough to deal with anything that happens to come your way.

If you are mentally weak, physically weak, or spiritually weak, you will be vulnerable and susceptible to influences. Anything can take possession of your body, if your mind is wavering. Don’t let the mind, the ego, and the intellect control you! You are no longer their slave. You know that you are the Source of everything. Now you know, that without your energy, the mind cannot function. You lack spiritual courage, this is the only problem. You have doubts. Why? What are these doubts? Where were these doubts prior to beingness? And where will they be, after you leave the body?

p.strong: 163. I feel trapped in the body, in maya

section.p: There is no maya. Maya is illusion. There is no Brahman either. Brahman is also illusion. You have nothing to do with maya. It is just a concept. You have nothing to do with Brahman, too, because these are only words, the names assigned for “illusion” and “Ultimate Truth”.

Where was this maya prior to beingness? Where was this Brahman prior to beingness? Where will Brahman be after leaving the body? Don’t let the words trap you. There is nothing in existence. Absolutely nothing is there. So, why struggle with all these illusory words like maya, Atman, God, Master? Okay, there is nothing wrong with these words. They are needed to communicate spiritual knowledge, to indicate your Ultimate Truth, etc. But, remember that you are subtler than the space or the sky. There are no restrictions, and no limitations. You are not trapped, you are a free bird. You can fly without wings. Forget about the past, forget about the future. Forget about the present. Forget about everything!

p.strong: 164. What are the things that are blocking us, Maharaj?

section.p: Nothing is blocking you. Your own imagination is blocking you. Nothing is there. Where are these things that are in the way? Where were these concepts prior to beingness? Was there anyone, or anything, blocking you, prior to beingness? And where will these obstacles be, when you leave the body? Your own concepts are attacking you, and causing confusion.

No-body is blocking you. No-thing is blocking you because there is nothing except Selfless Self. You are formless. Again, you are considering yourself as the body-form, and accepting the seen. Stay with the Seer, and not with the seen! You are just like the space or the sky. Does the sky have any identity? No! So, directly or indirectly, you are measuring yourself in the body-form, and not accepting the Reality.

Nisargadatta Maharaj gave us a good example: As a small child, you were given a few small copper coins to play with. You grew attached to them. When you grow up, if someone wants to give you a few golden coins, you will not accept them, because the copper coins are more precious to you. They have become invaluable to you because of your attachment to them over the years. If someone says, “Take this golden coin in exchange for your copper coin”, you will likely say, “No, no, no, I want to keep these ones!”

In a similar vein, you accepted so many wrong concepts in the beginning, that now, when Reality is presented to you, you cannot accept it because of your attachment to the world – exactly like the behaviour with the copper coins.

There needs to be a change in you, a shift, a change in your perception, so that you can surrender the old concepts and attachments, and accept Reality. Give yourself advice and guidance, because you are the central point of this world. There is nothing blocking you. You are subtler than the sky or space.
The entire world is projected out of your Invisible Anonymous Presence. Identify yourself!

p.strong: 165. When I came two years ago, this knowledge was being absorbed very easily, but not anymore

section.p: Don’t think like that! This is nothing but a play of your mind. The divinity, your divine essence is already within you. You are a Deity. That divinity is not separate from you. Knowledge is your Reality, your Ultimate Truth. Knowledge does not come or go. It is there. It is! It is a fact that you are Brahman. It is a fact that you are Ultimate Truth. Knowledge means just to identify yourself in a real sense. By now, you should know better, that the body is not your identity, and not be fooled by concepts again.

Meditate more! Concentrate more fully! Sometimes the so-called mind goes quiet for a while. But, then, suddenly, it erupts, as it tries to distract you from the Reality, and your practice. Be alert at all times! And don’t give so much importance to your mind, to the flow of thoughts.

Self-enquire! Who feels like that? Who is saying, “Last time that happened, and this time this is not happening”? This is a game of your mind. Don’t listen to these stories. Don’t give them attention, or any importance. Don’t worry about anything. I am giving you a hundred percent guarantee. I am not just giving you a warranty, but a guarantee! [Maharaj chuckles].

These days, guarantees are in short supply. You can easily get a warranty, but not a guarantee! But, I am giving you a hundred percent guarantee. Just follow me! Sri Siddharameshwar Maharaj, used to say: “If you take the first step, I will take the next step for you”. Don’t be anxious! Deposit all your worries here in the Ashram. Empty yourself, and leave everything here. Leave here with nothing. Leave as a blank slate.

p.strong: 166. Why is Realization so hard?

section.p: Hard? There is no hard! What is Realization? Realization just means to know yourself in a real sense. It is just Spontaneous Conviction. As long as you are measuring yourself in the body-form, there can be no Realization. Realization means Spontaneous Conviction of the Invisible Presence. It is your lack of Conviction that is creating the problems.

p.strong: 167. I just have this desire for closure of this whole spiritual search, rather than continuing to meditate, do Self-enquiry and listen to teachers

section.p: You are to undertake all these exercises until Conviction. Meditation, knowledge, reading books, and spiritual exercises are all the tools that will help you. They have their own limitations, but they are necessary to remind you of your forgotten Identity. Why are these practices required? Prior to beingness, we did not do any practices. And, after we leave the body, we will not be doing any either.

When Presence or Spirit clicked with the body, you forgot your Identity. To regain that Identity, to have Conviction of that Identity, all this spiritual knowledge, meditation, reading books and Masters are there. Knowledge has its limitations because “Knowledge is No Knowledge”. Prior to beingness, there was no knowledge. After beingness, there will not be any knowledge. Therefore, knowledge has its limitations, and is only used as a medium, or tool, until the concept of the food-body dissolves. This is a food-body [Maharaj points to his body] It has a beginning, a middle – when it grows and develops – and then it has an end.
Keep up the practice, until Spontaneous Conviction. Be patient! It will happen.

p.strong: 168. I have problems with my family. Why is my son not studying?

section.p: Spirituality is not concerned with family matters. Why is your son not studying? Why is your husband not more spiritual like you? How can I help you with that? I can’t help you! If your problems are family-related, then I cannot help you. You have come to the wrong place!

You see, the foundation, or core, of spirituality, is that you are not the body at all. This knowledge gives you the courage to live happily and peacefully. Since you are holding the body, you started to believe in the body, and then acted accordingly. Sometimes, there is depression, sadness, and problems like these family problems.

Some people, particularly the ladies, often complain that their husbands are not doing meditation, or not interested in spirituality. “Why is my husband like this? Why is my son like that? Why is he not learning? Why…?” What to do? What to do? [chuckling] I can’t take care of your family life.

Even after listening to these dialogues, and reading the spiritual books, that body-based concept is still stinging you. You are stumbling because you have not accepted your Reality. You do not have Spontaneous Conviction.

You may be reading the books, but the Conviction is absent. There are still some body-based concepts that have not yet dissolved. Conviction will not be possible, without a complete melting of all your concepts.

Even the intellectuals state that the body is not our identity. Where were all these bodies prior to beingness? Nothing was there. “My husband, my father, my sister, my guru” – all these concepts came along with the body. When you leave the body, where will they be? Nowhere! Nothing will remain! It is an open fact! Forget about spirituality for a moment, and think rationally and logically, about the body. The evidence is conclusive: it is a temporary phenomenon.

And further, if Presence were not there, this body would have no value. Without Presence, it is nothing but a dead body. After knowing the facts of your existence, you will have Conviction: “Why should I worry about birth and death? There is no birth, and there is no death”. What is inside this body? What’s there? Just glimpses of “I”. It is space, that is like a veil, a subtle veil, through which we feel “I”. If there is no veil, how can you feel “I”? We are directly experiencing that “I”. Spirit only knows itself through the body. It is its nature to want to continue with this life forever. Of course, that is not possible.

p.strong: 7 MISCELLANEOUS

p.emphasis: Don’t underestimate yourself! You are not a little, insignificant thing. You are Great! That Greatness is already within you. Stop ignoring it! The human body is a golden opportunity for you to finally know who you really are. So, please don’t waste any more time!

p.strong: 169. If there is no Realization, what happens?

section.p: Nothing! Nothing is going to happen. You will remain as a man, or a woman, and continue with all these concepts: “I am born”, “I am going to die”, “past birth”, “future birth”, “suffering” etc. You will take another form. There will be another dream.

p.strong: 170. As long as I recite the Mantra, I will be able to accept whatever comes my way. Is that right?

section.p: Don’t struggle with the mind. Don’t struggle with society. You are a Master! Make your own decisions. Take decisions on your own. Take this human life lightly. Don’t give it so much attention. Ignore what is to be ignored! Respond where needed! Accept what is useful, and reject the rest. This routine, daily life is illusory. The world is illusory! Don’t take it so seriously, or take it for real.

In the illusory world, everything is illusion, including myself, and yourself. It is a fact. I am placing before you the facts. What I am talking about now is illusory. What you are listening to, is also illusion. Think about it! Prior to beingness, there was no such thing as advice or guidance. These are concepts. Spiritual knowledge is also a concept.

For Perfect Identification and Perfect Conviction, we need to use a secondary thorn. This will remove the primary thorn. [A secondary concept removes the primary concept] You have mistaken your identity to be the body-form. You have been given “wrong” knowledge since childhood. You listened to “wrong” knowledge. Now you are listening to “right” knowledge.

I am placing before you the facts of your existence. I am not claiming to be a great Master because there is no difference between you and I. You do not know yourself, and therefore, the Master is guiding you to find your true identity.

Try to see Reality, the Reality within you. You are ignoring Reality. You need to sacrifice all of your concepts, before you can know yourself in a real sense. You are the Master of this world, without form! Birth-less and Death-less! There are no concepts of birth and death, or past lives and future lives. I am trying to hammer you with your Reality: “There is Nothing Except for Selfless Self”. We need to use words such as “you” and “I” to communicate, for teaching purposes. Just remember, that this “I” and “you”, are illusory. Brahman is also an illusion. Everything is illusion. Don’t cling to any concepts! Don’t hold onto any words. We are only using language as a medium to convey knowledge. Once this task has been completed, discard everything!

You are fighting with the concepts. You are fighting with yourself, because you consider yourself to be somebody: “I am a man”, or, “I am a woman”. This mistaken notion, this mistaken identity creates so much unnecessary confusion. There is no need for any confusion. There was no confusion prior to beingness. There will not be any confusion after beingness. What will happen to the body? Nothing is known! Nothing can be known!

“Nothingness” is projected into “somethingness”. The unknown became known when you became aware. When you started to know, you took the illusion for reality: “Oh, this something is reality”. This is very simple knowledge. A lack of confidence and willpower, is preventing you from accepting your Identity. It is stopping you from realizing, “Yes! I Am That”, without any ego. Then there will be spontaneous peacefulness.

I am placing before you, the Reality, your Reality, the Listener’s Reality, because the Invisible Listener within you is the Ultimate Truth, the Final Truth. So, instead of analyzing the words, try to convince yourself. Therefore, don’t analyze the words. See language for what it is, a means, and not an end in itself. Don’t struggle with the words. Try to identify, and understand what I am conveying to you.

All the gods and the goddesses are illusion. There is no such thing as a Great Power, that is in charge of everything. There is no other Greatness, but your Greatness. “You Are Great!” Because without your Presence, there is nothing! How can you identify the gods and goddesses, the Master and disciple, without your power, without the Power of Presence? Just imagine it for a moment, without Presence, you cannot view the world.

How was this life of yours prior to beingness? And how will this life of yours be, after beingness? This is just like a long dream. Every day, you see yourself, and then you see the world. The world is a projection of your Spontaneous Presence.

p.strong: 171. You say, there is nothing, but I think there is something else, there is a sense of beingness...

section.p: Don’t think! Why are you thinking about it? This is the Reality. When you think, you are taking a position, “I am a man, or a woman. I am male or female”. Who is experiencing the sense of beingness? What is that sense? Where is that sense, prior to beingness? And where will that sense be, after beingness?

What you are talking about is just imagination. You are formless. All the answers are within you. Prior to beingness, you are formless, at present you are formless, after leaving the body you are formless. There are no questions to be asked, such as: “How Am I?” It is just like space or sky. The sky does not know, “I am the sky or space.” Similarly the Presence within you does not know itself as “I am Presence”. It is Invisible, Anonymous, Unidentified, it cannot be defined.

Discard all your concepts, that is the purpose behind spirituality. You should take something from this Ashram. We do not want anything. We do not expect anything from you. But, you should learn something, earn something! Be That
Which You Are Already! You have an opportunity to know your Selfless Self, to identify your Selfless Self, to identify yourself.

This wonderful opportunity which you have to finally know who you are, does not cost anything. Grasp this opportunity with enthusiasm. This body is an instrument, through which you can identify yourself. “Reality Starts From You, and Ends With You.” You must have strong faith within you, to know yourself in a real sense. You know everything, but you still do not know yourself!

p.strong: 172. How can it be said that the waking life is no different from a dream?

section.p: Q: It is said that there is no difference between the waking life and dreams, yet in the waking life, things are very solid. For example, if I leave something on the table, it stays there, until I, or someone else moves it. These are the laws of physics, mathematics, biology, etc. There is no such continuity in dreams: all is chaos, and it is rare to find any sort of continuity from one dream to the next. When I awaken from a dream, I return to the same life and situations of my present life. So, how can you say that the waking life is no different from a dream?

Maharaj: How were you prior to beingness? Were there any dreams? And, after beingness, will there be any dreams? Where were the laws of physics, mathematics, biology? Where was this life that you speak of, prior to beingness?

When consciousness touched with the body, this kind of logical questioning began. There is no logic. Prior to beingness there was no logic, and no knowledge. Prior to beingness, you are unknown! You do not know yourself.

During deep sleep, while you are dreaming, there are many appearances. Who, or what, is manufacturing all these images? It is your Presence! Your Presence manifests your dream life, and your Presence manifests your waking life. Your Presence activates both the dream state and the waking state. The Experiencer of both, is one and the same. This Invisible Experiencer is called Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master.

The entire world is projected out of your Presence. Both the dream world, and this world, are projected out of your Invisible Presence. You are the Principle behind everything. In your dreams, your Presence is there. In this world also, your Presence is there. If there is no Presence, you cannot see yourself. There is nothing there.

The Sciences, Mathematics, Logic, Metaphysics, Philosophy etc, are all related to body-based knowledge. They came into existence with the consciousness. Therefore, avoid trying to explain your Reality, with these man-made disciplines! You are wasting your time.

What were you experiencing a hundred years ago? Nothing! Everything came out of nothing, and everything dissolves within nothing. You have all these concepts because you are posing yourself as the body-form. To get rid of all these concepts, we prescribe a potent medicine, a cocktail of meditation, reciting the Mantra, bhajans and knowledge.

Identify yourself. How were you prior to beingness? Formless, Stateless, Thoughtless. No knowledge, no experiencer, no nothing! That identification, that spontaneous identification, must be there. Only then, will all these questions finally dissolve completely.

p.strong: 173. If I do this sadhana, will I make progress?

section.p: Q: Normally a person expects something, and that is why, if these expectations are not met, there is depression. We think that if we do a certain sadhana, we will get something back. If this does not happen, then we will change Masters.

Maharaj: What progress is required? Who wants progress? There is no “I” no “you”, “he”, “she”, “it”. Prior to beingness, did you expect progress? And when you leave the body, will you be looking for progress? You have consumed a lot of spiritual knowledge from various Masters. Will that knowledge help you, when it is your time to leave the body?

You have met spiritual Masters, and you have read many books. You are a master of spiritual knowledge. Question yourself! Self-enquire! “Will all this knowledge help me on my deathbed?” The answer is there: No! Whatever spiritual knowledge you have, will not be useful to you when you leave the body. Has this knowledge, given you the spiritual courage to face each and every problem? If you do not apply your spiritual knowledge, and make it pragmatic, it is not going to serve you.

The fact is that you are unborn, but you are posing as a separate entity, who thinks, “I am born, my personality is like this, and I am going to die”. There are lots of other concepts swimming around. Find the courage to dissolve them. And find the courage to accept the Reality because Reality is not something that is separate from you. You are Reality.
Q: You said that after death, spiritual knowledge is useless?

Maharaj: You see, death and birth are also concepts. No one has had an experience of death and birth. In a dream, you may witness someone’s death. But then, when you wake up, you say, “it was a dream, a bad dream”.
Q: People who follow a spiritual practice...
Maharaj: Why are you thinking about the people? Think about yourself! What you see, is the Seer’s reflection, the Seer’s projection. If there were no Seer, how can you see the people?
Q: You cannot.

Maharaj: If there is no Presence in your body, how can you see the people? This means that the entire world is projected out of your Presence. If there is no Presence there, for even just a moment, who is going to talk about the people? Who will talk about God, the Master, and everything else? Dissolve that concept! You are thinking of these people, and whether they are realized people, or non-realized people. Why?

Think about yourself. It is the habit of your mind, to take the touch, of each and everything in the world. The world itself is illusion. Shankara says, “To say “I”, is illusion, to say “you”, is illusion, to say Brahman is illusion, the entire world is illusion”. Where are the people? Where is God? Where are the Masters? This is plain knowledge. Again, I will repeat the same thing, that the only way to absorb this Reality is through meditation. Dry discussions, and reading thousands of books, are totally meaningless. These activities will only give you some sort of temporary intoxication, like painkillers. “Everything Starts From You and Everything Ends Within You.”

p.strong: 174. Should I eat vegetarian food, or not?

section.p: Don’t be concerned with that. If your body likes something, you can take it. But don’t have too much of anything. The body is a food-body. Look after the body, and nourish it well. Here, there are no rules, about being a vegetarian, or a non-vegetarian. The food-body is separate from you. Were you a vegetarian or non-vegetarian, prior to beingness? Of course, not! Eat what is good for you, and what agrees with you. Keep it simple, and don’t feel guilty about eating non-vegetarian food, if you are a vegetarian. Don’t be too serious about it all!
Don’t be concerned with what you are doing, or not doing. “Who Is Speaking From This Body? Who Is Listening From This Body? It is an Unidentified Identity. There Is No Shape, No Form.”
Even though you know that you are not the body, you still want the body to survive forever! Try to know yourself!
Try to convince yourself! It is easy to convince others, but, it is most important that you convince your Selfless Self.
Maya is distracting you from Reality. Keep up the meditation practice. It is the only way you will dissolve these illusory concepts.

p.strong: 175. What comes first, the Absolute, or food?

section.p: Q: Basically, what I understood is that the consciousness is the quality of the food. And because of the consciousness, the Absolute is able to understand its Presence. And, for the Absolute to have consciousness, food is essential. But when we say the “Absolute” and the “food”, then there is a duality. So, which one comes first, the Absolute or the food?

Maharaj: There is no “first”. Nothing comes first. When did you first come across food? Was there food prior to beingness? When did you first come across the “Absolute”? Was there an Absolute, prior to beingness?
Q: No!
Maharaj: Will there be any food after beingness?
Q: No!
Maharaj: Is there any Absolute prior to, or, after beingness?
Q: The Absolute is...

Maharaj: Now you are thinking intellectually, “the Absolute, and then, something else. You are the Absolute. You are Ultimate Truth. Ultimate Truth is not separate from you. This is a food-body. When the Spirit clicked with the body, you said, “I”. Your Presence is needed to say “I”. If there is no Presence, who will talk about this “I”?

You say, “the Absolute is there, or food is there”. This is an intellectual game. You are just amusing yourself, playing with the words. There is no Absolute, no intellect, and there is no food either. All these concepts came along with the body. What is the Absolute? You are the Absolute!

Because you are thinking from a body-base, you discriminate and separate everything from the whole, saying, “this must be the “Absolute”, and that will be “Ultimate Truth”, and this will be the “food-body”. There is no discrimination. The words are used solely for us to communicate and understand. The Absolute is not separate from you. It is because the Absolute is there, that the food-body is there.

The Absolute is Invisible. It cannot be imagined. You cannot guess what it is like. It is Spontaneous Existence. Because you are holding the body, you are trying to guess how that Spirit, that Absolute is, through the mind, ego and intellect. Prior to beingness, did you know about the “Absolute”? Did you know about the “I am”? Of course not! There was nothing there.

These are only the words that we use to identify ourselves. Spiritual language contains so many words: Absolute, Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, consciousness, awareness, and thousands upon thousands of words are there, thousands of words are there. Instead of defining the words, instead of playing with the words, try to identify what they are trying to convey. Or, after reading the books, this Ultimate Truth, Selfless Self, I Am That, Ramana Maharshi, etc, instead of defining their words, and analyzing the sentences, pay attention to the meaning behind the words. What do they wish to convey? Language is of secondary importance. That which the Masters wish to convey is of paramount importance.

The message is that “Except Your Selfless Self, there is no God, no Brahman, no Atman, no Paramatman, no Master”. All these names have been ascribed to your Spontaneous Existence, your Presence. That You Are! The Absolute is not separate from you. Ultimate Truth is not separate from you. Because you are measuring yourself in the body-from, through the intellect and the ego, you feel something, and then you say, “this is the Absolute, and this is the food-body, and this is something else”. There is no discrimination. That Reality is supposed to be absorbed. And for this to happen, meditation is essential. It is the first lesson, the foundation. Dry knowledge will not help you. We could carry on talking about this spiritual knowledge, but it would be meaningless – just more spiritual entertainment, like a spiritual massage, or a spiritual sauna.

p.strong: 176. What is the significance of Hari Narayana?

section.p: Q: Maharaj, today I was reading the Bhajans, and everywhere it says Hari Narayana, Hari Narayana. Any significance?

Maharaj: These names are not so significant. There are many names. Basically, you need to concentrate on the Invisible Concentrator within you. Rama, Krishna, Narayana and Vitthala, are the names given to the Almighty Supernatural Power, which is already within you. There were no names, such as these names, prior to beingness. And there will not be any names, after beingness either. All these names appeared upon your Presence. Prior to that, we did not know anything about Rama, Krishna, Narayana and Vitthala.

So, beingness is a temporary concept. It has a time limit. It is the span between the so-called birth and death. Birth means awakening, just to say “I”. Death means the disappearance of existence. Death and birth are concerned with this body only, and you are not the body at all.

p.strong: 177. Every question is answered in your books, so I can’t make up any questions

section.p: Maharaj: This is practical knowledge. It is your knowledge, the Listener’s knowledge, not the knowledge of Ramakant Maharaj, or of some other Maharaj. You also have this Reality of Maharaj. It is the same Reality. You are not separate from Maharaj. Our names are different, that is all. It is only because we consider ourselves to be the body-form, that we keep finding differences, where there are none. The bodies may be different, but the Spirit is one.

Recite the Mantra, and then concentrate on meditation. All your problems will be solved! Unless all your body-based concepts dissolve, you will not be able to identify yourself, and consequently, you will not find any peacefulness. You have been suffocated by concepts since childhood. Now you need to discard all these concepts, including the concept of God. God is the name given to the supernatural power which is already within you.

p.strong: 178. Can we say that Ultimate Truth uses the body to know Itself?

section.p: Maharaj: “Ultimate Truth is Not Separate From You.” There are many concepts swarming around Ultimate Truth, so one should not become their victim. I am referring to this whole background, because there is so much misunderstanding. People are asking, “Is there a last birth, a future birth? Is it okay to take “Rama Nama”? There is “Nama”, “Hanuman Chalisi”, and other similar concepts. They are not bad concepts, and they can be helpful, in the beginning. But, they are not useful for that moment when you exit from the body.

If you say, “Ram, Ram, Ram, Ram, Ram”, at the point of leaving the body, it will not help you. Ram is just a name given to a body-based concept. Energy is needed to say “Ram, Ram”, or “Shiva, Shiva”. “I Am Inviting the Attention of That Energy Through Which You Are Talking”, through which you are watching the world, through which you are watching your dreams, and everything else. That energy is called Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master. That You are!

After Spontaneous Conviction, all your actions and reactions will be illusory ones, because you will know that there is no birth or death. Conviction will come with meditation. Through the meditation, you are hammering yourself “I am Brahman, Brahman I am, I am Brahman, I am Brahman”. This is called “Soham Sadhana”. It is the base of this spiritual knowledge. This practice will eliminate all the concepts, including religious concepts.

The Bhagavad Gita, tells us to discard all religions, and bow down to that invisible “I”, through which you identify all religions. Forget about all illusory religions. They are created to establish a happy and peaceful society. Religion is meant to bring happiness and peacefulness to society.

Since you are Ultimate Truth, the Invisible Presence appears in you. The purpose of “Except Your Selfless Self There Is No God, No Brahman, No Atman, No Paramatman. Rama, Krishna” is to convey that many different names have been given to that Ultimate Truth, but it is not any of those names. These names are used to help you identify your Reality.

Ultimate Truth has been called by so many names, but it is none of these names. It is not Ram, Krishna, or anything. Therefore, Saint Tukaram said, “All these gods are imaginary gods, and they will dissolve along with the imagination”. You are separate from all of that. So, stick up for the Real. Stick with Reality. It is the Reality called Ultimate Truth That You Are. This is the principle of spirituality.

p.strong: 179. It is said in spiritual science, that your last desire takes you to another dream

section.p: Maharaj: If your last desire is very strong when you are leaving the body, then it will take birth. That is the concept of spiritual science. It is not true, but it may happen. To avoid all this, you need to have the Conviction that, “I am nothing to do with this world. I am the Seer, the Invisible Seer, I am Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master”. It is a good concept, which will dissolve all your attachments to the body.

When the Spontaneous Conviction arises, you return to the way you were prior to beingness, “I am nothing to do with the body, and nothing to do with the world”. You will attend to your responsibilities as before, and find the courage to meet any challenges that come your way. The difference is that you will be fully aware that you are just role-playing.

p.strong: 180. You are talking about the new world. What about the old world?

section.p: Maharaj: There is no new world, and there is no old world. The world is created, or projected, from your Presence. Where is this old world, and new world? Nothing is there. What happens is that we accumulate knowledge from many different sources: books, teachers, reading, listening, and absorbing everything around us. You are to forget everything, dissolve all this illusory, body-based knowledge.

It is just like when you fill up your new smartphone with new applications. And then, we remove the old, unnecessary apps. The human body is a big computer, the biggest computer. It has been filled with concepts, engraved with concepts for the last thirty, fifty, or seventy years. Meditation will remove all your body-based knowledge.

p.strong: 181. Is that also another thought … that which wants peace?

section.p: Maharaj: No thought, no thought, it is a thoughtless state. There is no thought there. Thoughts and concepts came along with the body-form. Where were the thoughts prior to beingness, and after beingness?

Who wants peacefulness? Who wants happiness? Who is afraid? And what are you afraid of? You are still considering yourself as the body-form, even though you know that it is not your identity. Remove all the concepts. Be completely blank. Identify yourself!

p.strong: 182. Is meditation and Self-enquiry the same thing?

section.p: Maharaj: There is Self-enquiry in the beginning. Self-enquiry means investigating “Who am I? What is Brahman?” You Self-enquire because you have forgotten your Identity. Then meditation gives you some clues or landmarks. Through meditation, you are able to identify yourself. Through meditation, through that Mantra that will be given to you, you are hammering yourself, “Yes! I am Brahman, Brahman I am”. So, I will give you the Mantra today. Recite it with full confidence. Devote quality time for yourself. The human body is a wonderful opportunity for you, as identification can only happen through the human body.

Don’t confuse yourself. Forget all that you have read, and listened to, so far. Forget it! “The Listener within you is the Ultimate Truth. The Invisible Reader within you is the Ultimate Truth. The Invisible Experiencer is the Ultimate Truth.” The entire world is projected out of your Invisible Presence. God did not create this world. This is another myth!

There is no God who created this world. The world is the Seer’s reflection. When the Spirit clicks with the body, you see the world. To regain your identity, meditation is recommended. The Naam Mantra is given, and we are also asking you to sing bhajans, to create an atmosphere that is conducive to aiding Conviction.

p.strong: 183. How important is Self-enquiry? And, is there an end to it?

section.p: Maharaj: Self-enquiry is required because Ultimate Truth is missing, Selfless Self is missing. In the beginning, Self-enquiry is essential. “Who Am I?” is the most important question in life. The Questioner itself is the Ultimate Truth, but because we are holding the body, we wrongly consider the body-form to be our identity. Therefore, Self-enquiry is required because you don’t have the address that can take you home. You do not know your own address.

We know everyone else’s address, but we do not know our own! Who am I? Find out! Self-enquiry leads to Self-knowledge. Self-knowledge leads to Self-Realization. These are the three stages in the spiritual life. Why Self-enquiry? Because we do not know ourselves. There is much confusion about Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master, confusion about spiritual knowledge, confusion about ourselves. While you are undergoing spiritual enquiry, you will come to know Brahman – That You Are.

p.strong: 184. What is enquiry?

section.p: We are talking about the nature, and the fate of the unborn child. Self-enquiry is okay in the beginning, because we do not know ourselves. We are told many things: that there is a God!

And that God is great! Find out what is true, and what is false. Knowledge is within you alone. It is not separate from you. Your “Spontaneous Invisible Existence” is itself a sign of knowledge, Reality, Ultimate Truth, Final Truth. Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master. There are many different names for your Reality, your Ultimate Truth.

I will repeat it again: You are Almighty God! God is not separate from you. So stop measuring yourself in the body-form. It is an open fact that you were not the body. You are not the body. And, you are not going to remain the body. But you have identified with the body-form. You have accepted it as your true identity. So, Self-enquiry is helpful at the early stage, to investigate what you are not.

Self-enquiry will lead you to the central question: “if I am not the body, then who am I?” You say: Brahman, Atman, Paramatman. How is that Brahman? It cannot be imagined, and, it is beyond inference, because it is a Spontaneous Existence without any identity – where there is no experience, experiencer, or witness. It is described as “Nothingness”. “Everything came out of nothing, and everything dissolves within nothing.”

p.strong: 185. Where does the body and the Spirit come from?

section.p: Take dreams as an example! In a dream, you can see the whole world. You see various people and places. How did this dream come into existence? In the dream, you are acting as a real person. Who has created this dream world? Your Spontaneous Invisible Presence! The world is also projected out of your Spontaneous Invisible Presence.
There is no reason behind it all. But, because we are holding the body, we have become very attached to it. Further, we have been gifted with the intellect, and so, we ask intellectual questions.

Your existence is an anonymous, invisible, unidentified existence. You are trying to use reason and logic because you are holding the body. You think “I am somebody”. There is no reason for a particular dream. Each day, you see a different dream. You see yourself, different people, places, circumstances, and happenings.

This information is short and sweet, because lengthy talk is meaningless. Now the ball is in your court. You have to undergo strict meditation, with the words that have been given to you. If you do not have the Naam Mantra, you may say: Aham Brahmasmi, Brahmasmi Aham. These are only words, but through these words, you are trying to hammer the body-based knowledge.

It is very important to recite the Mantra all the time. After continuous hammering, this illusory body-knowledge will be discarded, and all the concepts will be erased. That is the purpose of the practice. You will be totally free. You are basically free now, but you don’t know that you are, because of the various pressures that make you feel that you are in bondage, and unfree. Meditation will dissolve all your mistaken concepts.

I do not see you as a disciple, I see the Master within you. Nisargadatta says, “I am not making you a disciple, I am making you a Master”, because the Master is already within you! You are covered in ash, the ash of illusory concepts. The Master removes the ash.

p.strong: 186. What is Self-knowledge? Is it a direct sense of the primary “I”?

section.p: Maharaj: No, no, no! Self-knowledge means Conviction. At present, you know yourself as a man, or as a woman. You are neither a man nor a woman, you are Brahman! When the Spirit touched with the body, we started knowing ourselves as human beings. Who is acting within the human body? Who is listening? Who is reading? Who is enjoying the food? Who is watching the entire world? This is called Self-enquiry.

When you approach a Master, you are asking the question, “Who am I?” That is Self-enquiry. The Master reveals your true Identity, and tells you that you are Brahman, Atman, Paramatman, God, Master. You respond with disbelief: “How can I be Brahman? How can I be a Master?”

The Master explains that the body is not your identity at all. The body is subject to death and birth. You are not, because you are the Holder of the body. You are subtler than the sky, or space. How are you prior to beingness? You reply with, “I don’t know”. How will you be after leaving the body? You reply with “I don’t know”. This means the responder who says, “I don’t know”, is saying, “I am not in any form”. You are formless.

So, we need to Self-enquire because we do not know who we are. “You are Missing Yourself. You are Missing Your Ultimate Truth.” Self-enquiry corrects our wrong identification, our mistaken identification. Self-enquiry leads to Self-knowledge: Perfect Identification. The Invisible Identifier within you is Ultimate Truth. Your Identity is Unidentified, Invisible, Anonymous Identity.

Practice Self-enquiry! If you perceive yourself as a separate entity, an individual, a mere body-form, then Self-enquiry is needed. The Enquirer Itself is the Ultimate Truth. Self-knowledge is the recognition that “I am Brahman, Ultimate Truth”. Self-knowledge leads to Self-Realization, that Self-Conviction, which enables you to live detached from the body and the world. You are holding the body, but you are not concerned with the body or with the world. You are established in your Ultimate Truth. Nothing can touch you.

p.strong: 187. Spontaneous waves of light occasionally appear. Do these experiences enable Self-enquiry, or are they just mind-body-knowledge to be discounted?

section.p: Maharaj: There is no experience, and no experiencer. At the ultimate stage there is no experience, no experiencer. These are only statements, words, to try and convince the Invisible Listener within you. At that stage, there is no experience or experiencer remaining. How were you prior to beingness? There was nothing there, then. There were no questions, no knowledge. It is the same, after you leave the body. There will not be any questions or knowledge.
